name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Hunt for Congress Weekly Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

As we continue to monitor the development of Tropical Storm Marco and Tropical Storm Laura, I hope that you and your family are staying safe and healthy. We all know how unpredictable these storms can be and Emily and I are praying for those who find themselves in harms way.

It has been another productive week on the Hunt campaign; I am proud of what we have accomplished in the past 7 days and I look forward to all that we will achieve in the days leading up to November 3rd. Election day will be here before we know it and I am greatly encouraged by the work we have done so far.

On Monday, I released a new digital advertisement conveying my vision for a more robust and resilient future powered by our small businesses and energy workers. Despite the trials and challenges of the coronavirus, I am confident that through limited and effective governance, we can ensure that Houston remains an opportunity-rich city for years to come.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=4da6ef89019d4cc987a090ece3788fa8&_e=g7D_6MuSsVIMT4FDsMedrMI7hBjiPd5VEvgPcJABh4PpVsPlj_9z4IuqR_jG9HyXL3NLT6eIIysM4751JPeYbMNXRnwMr9N3O0XunzxZJ4rthNz1EbUyneZCEflcFVIdIKBkgkcvpU7WbNyZvq3EPfEvHTMno31XSVZuPm2sPW8wK5FfrDZ08Gt5NZBwJgzVB_zOhTvYmik0BQtlLLtNtZtw2AgB-hk3GE8On34oCnN4jUtuW-ylrtdPodaWtfECKrr8MXSmWY1TAlRebiYVLcrxlppSej7r8gDsvOXtVTc24VMWf4IRcjuwptMm4j9b)

On Tuesday, I was proud to announce the Team Hunt Medical Professionals Advisory Board. Houston attracts some of the greatest medical minds in the world, and I am humbled that so many healthcare professionals in and around the Houston area are committed to supporting my campaign. I look forward to collaborating with the Team Hunt Medical Professionals Advisory Board to address the challenges and opportunities facing both patients and healthcare providers. If you are interested in joining the Advisory Board, please contact my campaign today. You can find the current list of board members [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=4da6ef89019d4cc987a090ece3788fa8&_e=g7D_6MuSsVIMT4FDsMedrAIVaI7VWnANzmc5-3eG0jpoxoBnMjv1cRuuKbHc96e3ZSdCWdELc7gY3ho8LsuMk4ikBLnwAFbV0EaIXN84H4iN1RijewGlYpyL9QTKfMuTPRgwTB8JPlN54Dcc5_thPSMeHdfJmXt8sxciYvg65U9yOj3D8JRgLtgbwi3cd2BSGYvqrkQimUokTC8pJQhWtwBERLFOAaqgUd1NACAF1W9hBMnGqT9T1fkUILogBTiToKCN8edptffUQAfKIYPNk4b-UMVZhN1mtSq7gCw4t2sCj7Eo1qosWVgShxAupsTMTc9U2IzKDuMut90kllvaNQ%3D%3D).

_In case you missed it_ , we are so close to reaching our August goal of distributing 10,000 yard signs. If you are interested in putting up a Hunt for Congress yard sign or if you already have one but would like to order some for your friends or neighbors, please email the campaign at info@wesleyfortexas.com. If you can't make it out to our office to pick up a sign, someone from Team Hunt will gladly deliver one to you as soon as possible.

I want to once again convey my gratitude for the many Team Hunt volunteers who are making phone calls, safely knocking on doors, and spreading the word within their communities. Individuals like you make a tremendous difference, and you hard work is setting us up for success in November.

Thank you,
Wesley

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=4da6ef89019d4cc987a090ece3788fa8&_e=g7D_6MuSsVIMT4FDsMedrG42hLFDWqTjVvlgrlqjyWRv7GlpvB-e8Nz_Mihw74ye80GqHv-VXgm0veYcXaQkxGlCp7YIknMPAPDgM03w5CPBmdRV8lVgLo-bYUGIvIiH4I6JlYLTc_JcLXS93axlJYHqKFEI3f-1CSKyPPoJ-zwuHegqWlkmJzP7DGA0BfQNuGDtNqCZ9Xl8KYOwm-VODO0CFkIGDYcg-GEveYf1oTrugMrYEp4ObQ9Yfaur_KqfEfO6Xlzy8G65e2P93kGl6URtMUEhTNgfWPv1VAyi_u0%3D)****

Did you hear the news, Friend?

I just announced how I’m going to keep FIGHTING FOR YOU with my second-term agenda.

>From the day I became your President, I have put America First with every decision that I make. Unfortunately, the Democrats are threatening to DESTROY everything if they TAKE BACK the Nation.

We cannot let that happen. Where the Left sees American darkness, I see American greatness.

These next 71 days will be absolutely brutal as we get closer to Election Day. I need my BEST supporters to step up to the front lines and help me WIN BIG so that I can implement my critical second-term agenda.

I’m calling on YOU to step up and FIGHT FOR YOUR PRESIDENT and the future of this Nation. This is so important that FOR THE NEXT HOUR, I’ve activated 500%-MATCHING on all contributions.

body:
TEA PARTY PATRIOTS ACTION LIVE
THIS AFTERNOON - MONDAY, AUG 24TH @ 1 P.M. ET » [FB.COM](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjM3LWQ4YmJlZWEzNWVlYjQ5OGI5NjYyOGYyODZiZWE4NWNh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL3BnL3RlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHM_bWlkPTQyNTcwJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=RKxnlirV1nMNfSCg9cluvA) OR [TPP.US/LIVE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjM3LWQ4YmJlZWEzNWVlYjQ5OGI5NjYyOGYyODZiZWE4NWNh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvbGl2ZT9taWQ9NDI1NzAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=m4lmMBHqp6SdIHbAhTZMRA) | |
---
This week’s action items include reading through and sharing resources about how safe it actually is to reopen schools – and keep them open. There are resources for you to get up-to-speed on some radical, left-wing trainings being forced on federal employees. We also need to continue sharing the letter about hydroxychloroquine, the videos of doctors telling the truth, and the petition against Big Tech censorship. And, as always, we have a new civics lesson!

_Note: in order to share the links below, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
**Read and Share School Reopening Resources**
We have collected a lot of important resources about how it safe it is for children to go back to school in one PDF, from news articles to research papers with hard data, and more. It is two pages, and some of the reports and papers are quite dense and long. [So, the major action item this week is to take some time every day to go through the links.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjM3LWQ4YmJlZWEzNWVlYjQ5OGI5NjYyOGYyODZiZWE4NWNh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1Jlc291cmNlcy1QYXJlbnRzLVJlb3BlbmluZy1TY2hvb2xzLnBkZj9taWQ9NDI1NzAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=LOORmx1aYNoixXLZL_qipQ) As you do, please share them with others over social media and/or over email by copying and pasting the links from the PDF.
[DOWNLOAD](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjM3LWQ4YmJlZWEzNWVlYjQ5OGI5NjYyOGYyODZiZWE4NWNh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1Jlc291cmNlcy1QYXJlbnRzLVJlb3BlbmluZy1TY2hvb2xzLnBkZj9taWQ9NDI1NzAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=B0qJIaC99GvajOjzWiiS3g)
|
---
**Read and Share Explosive Info About US Departments & National Laboratories**
What started as a radical, fringe academic theory in universities has now jumped ship to various federal agencies, departments, and even to the United States’ premier nuclear research lab. “Critical Race Theory” is a hard left, revolutionary philosophy – the kind we’ve seen promoted by rioters in the streets for over 80 days now – that borrows heavily from Marxism and something called “Marxist conflict theory.” For now, we just want to make sure you are aware and caught up with what is happening, and share it with others so that they can also be aware.

Christopher Rufo, from the Discovery Institute and Heritage Foundation, has uncovered, through whistleblowers, the taxpayer-funded trainings and abuse of employees with racist, left-wing re-education camps. Read through his Twitter threads linked below (you can read them even if you don’t have a Twitter account – just open the links and read). If you spend a little time reading through his Twitter account, you will see just how pervasive this radical mindset is across our government. He has also written about these matters at his website, [ChristopherRufo.com](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjM3LWQ4YmJlZWEzNWVlYjQ5OGI5NjYyOGYyODZiZWE4NWNh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9jaHJpc3RvcGhlcnJ1Zm8uY29tLz9taWQ9NDI1NzAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=3FxmN1uydpinyPwCuW6LYg).

**Make Real Civics Education a Priority Again
Week of August 24th
**
Keep an eye out every week for a new activity or book or lesson to bring real civics back to our children.

**This week, we will discuss Benjamin Franklin’s statement, “A republic, if you can keep it.”** [Read this Townhall article](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjM3LWQ4YmJlZWEzNWVlYjQ5OGI5NjYyOGYyODZiZWE4NWNh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTU%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90b3duaGFsbC5jb20vY29sdW1uaXN0cy9wYXVsY3VycnkvMjAxOS8wNi8yNS9hLXJlcHVibGljLWlmLXlvdS1jYW4ta2VlcC1pdC1uMjU0ODg3MT9taWQ9NDI1NzAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=74-Q9AFJ9g2gb4TlLMo4LQ) about this famous response from Franklin, and then read this article about how [America is a republic and not a democracy](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjM3LWQ4YmJlZWEzNWVlYjQ5OGI5NjYyOGYyODZiZWE4NWNh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTY%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90aGVmZWRlcmFsaXN0LmNvbS8yMDE4LzAyLzA3L3NvcnJ5LWxpYmVyYWxzLWFtZXJpY2Etbm90LWRlbW9jcmFjeS1iZXR0ZXItd2F5Lz9taWQ9NDI1NzAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=oQPF1hmwzLoF66otnSbAlA) from _The Federalist_.

If you have younger children, you can have a simple discussion with them about a republic vs. a democracy, and why our Founders wisely chose a republican form of government.

If you have older children who are aware of the unrest, the tearing down of statues, and the left’s attempt to erase our history, then you can expand the discussion to include how the attempt to erase and rewrite our national history is connected to the idea of a republic vs. democracy. The same people who want to tear society down and rewrite history are the same people who want to transform America from a republic into a democracy.

Discuss why that might be – why would erasing history help with the cause of transforming our entire form of government? [_Conservative Review_ has an interesting article](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjM3LWQ4YmJlZWEzNWVlYjQ5OGI5NjYyOGYyODZiZWE4NWNh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTc%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uc2VydmF0aXZlcmV2aWV3LmNvbS9uZXdzL3doeS10aGUtb2JzZXNzaW9uLXdpdGgtdGVhcmluZy1kb3duLW1vbnVtZW50cy1pcy1kdW1iLWRhbmdlcm91cy8_bWlkPTQyNTcwJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=W9WsS6anJcXqMCaBGnOlhQ) about underlying reasons and how they are connected to tearing down statues that you may want to read with older children.

Lastly, either for your own education or that of your older children, we’ve also included resources to push back on the “most divisive lie in American history,” told again and again by Joe Biden. It’s called the “very fine people hoax,” and it’s about the lie stemming from the infamous Charlottesville events a few years ago. This is also a good lesson about how twisting history is done deliberately, for political purposes. Here are two resources to help you know the truth.
* [Scott Adams systematically debunks the “very fine people hoax”](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjM3LWQ4YmJlZWEzNWVlYjQ5OGI5NjYyOGYyODZiZWE4NWNh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2NvdHRhZGFtc3NheXMuY29tLzIwMTkvMDQvMzAvdGhlLWZpbmUtcGVvcGxlLWhvYXgtZnVubmVsLz9taWQ9NDI1NzAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=EckJ8rF_hdzreXTmfj5NCA)
* [PragerU video: “The Charlottesville Lie”](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjM3LWQ4YmJlZWEzNWVlYjQ5OGI5NjYyOGYyODZiZWE4NWNh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTk%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9OTTZrOHVOQVFCQT9taWQ9NDI1NzAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=TGRyIiQajtZleSV5zDITCw)

In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin

clean_body: TEA PARTY PATRIOTS ACTION LIVE THIS AFTERNOON - MONDAY, AUG 24TH @ 1 P.M. ET » OR | | This week’s action items include reading through and sharing resources about how safe it actually is to reopen schools – and keep them open. There are resources for you to get up-to-speed on some radical, left-wing trainings being forced on federal employees. We also need to continue sharing the letter about hydroxychloroquine, the videos of doctors telling the truth, and the petition against Big Tech censorship. And, as always, we have a new civics lesson! Note: in order to share the links below, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it. | Read and Share School Reopening Resources We have collected a lot of important resources about how it safe it is for children to go back to school in one PDF, from news articles to research papers with hard data, and more. It is two pages, and some of the reports and papers are quite dense and long. As you do, please share them with others over social media and/or over email by copying and pasting the links from the PDF. | Read and Share Explosive Info About US Departments & National Laboratories What started as a radical, fringe academic theory in universities has now jumped ship to various federal agencies, departments, and even to the United States’ premier nuclear research lab. “Critical Race Theory” is a hard left, revolutionary philosophy – the kind we’ve seen promoted by rioters in the streets for over 80 days now – that borrows heavily from Marxism and something called “Marxist conflict theory.” For now, we just want to make sure you are aware and caught up with what is happening, and share it with others so that they can also be aware. Christopher Rufo, from the Discovery Institute and Heritage Foundation, has uncovered, through whistleblowers, the taxpayer-funded trainings and abuse of employees with racist, left-wing re-education camps. Read through his Twitter threads linked below (you can read them even if you don’t have a Twitter account – just open the links and read). If you spend a little time reading through his Twitter account, you will see just how pervasive this radical mindset is across our government. He has also written about these matters at his website, . and | Continue to Watch, Share, and Sign: Censored Videos, Letters, and Petitions “Ask a Medical Expert” Video with Physicians Censored Videos of Physicians from the DC Summit & Press Conferences The Hydroxychloroquine Letter Petition Against Big Tech Censorship Second Opinion Project Interviews with Doctors | Make Real Civics Education a Priority Again Week of August 24th Keep an eye out every week for a new activity or book or lesson to bring real civics back to our children. This week, we will discuss Benjamin Franklin’s statement, “A republic, if you can keep it.” about this famous response from Franklin, and then read this article about how from The Federalist. If you have younger children, you can have a simple discussion with them about a republic vs. a democracy, and why our Founders wisely chose a republican form of government. If you have older children who are aware of the unrest, the tearing down of statues, and the left’s attempt to erase our history, then you can expand the discussion to include how the attempt to erase and rewrite our national history is connected to the idea of a republic vs. democracy. The same people who want to tear society down and rewrite history are the same people who want to transform America from a republic into a democracy. Discuss why that might be – why would erasing history help with the cause of transforming our entire form of government? about underlying reasons and how they are connected to tearing down statues that you may want to read with older children. Lastly, either for your own education or that of your older children, we’ve also included resources to push back on the “most divisive lie in American history,” told again and again by Joe Biden. It’s called the “very fine people hoax,” and it’s about the lie stemming from the infamous Charlottesville events a few years ago. This is also a good lesson about how twisting history is done deliberately, for political purposes. Here are two resources to help you know the truth. body:
Friend,

Did you see Margaret’s email? Donald Trump is undermining the U.S. Postal Service in an effort to suppress the ability for Floridians and all Americans to vote-by-mail.

And his efforts don’t just hurt our democracy -- they put American lives at risk, preventing the timely delivery of life-saving medications and more.

**We need every single one of our supporters to sign our petition now, to demand that Congress takes decisive action to save the U.S. Postal Service.**

**[Please, join Margaret in calling on Congress to save the U.S. Postal Service today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18823751/241043885/-1979251808?code=MG&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fgood-ja-up%3Frefcode%3D082420-es-save-usps-kicker&refcode=082420-es-post-office-ja-kicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDkyMjkxZi0yMGU2LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P04M38IUNQTion1vSlBMGmJZaXnX7EmYYR16RW-IygU=&emci=257a7129-6ce5-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=6492291f-20e6-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=9814644)**

name: Team Nicole
subject: 🚨 Breaking News: HUGE Endorsement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Friends, Nicole just received the endorsement of the New York City Police Benevolent Association, the NYPD’s largest union of 50,000 members.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=265A442A1A5819)
---
| | |
---
| | Friends-

Nicole just received the endorsement of the New York City Police Benevolent Association, the NYPD’s largest union of 50,000 members.

NYC PBA President Pat Lynch said:
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | "On behalf of the 50,000 members of the NYC PBA I am proud to endorse Assemblywoman Nicole Malliotakis in her campaign for New York State’s 11th Congressional District. Assemblywoman Malliotakis has always been a true friend of the NYPD and all law enforcement. She has stood by the men and women of the NYPD during her five terms in state legislature and continues to do so today, when many elected officials like incumbent Congressman Max Rose have joined the anti-police mob. This is the most hotly contested race in New York City this November and it creates the opportunity for our members, their families, friends and all supporters of the NYPD to send a resounding message to every elected official in New York City; law abiding New Yorkers are ready to take this city back."

---
| | [ HELP US WIN → ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=265A442A1A5820)
---
| | |
---
| | "Her opponent, Congressman Max Rose, has claimed he supports law enforcement. But when it came time for him to stand tall and show that support, he chose the opposite. He chose to take part in a June demonstration on Staten Island where marchers carried signs reading, ‘Abolish the NYPD,’ ‘Blue Lives Murder’ and ‘Defund the Police’ as the crowd chanted those slogans and others as they converged on the 122nd Precinct. He chose to sign on to a bill that dumps all of the blame and liability for bad policing policies onto police officers on the street."

"Congressman Rose, you can’t have it both ways. You made your choice. Now New York City police officers will make ours."
[
We’re highlighting this major endorsement in our new ad, premiering today. We can’t let Max Rose and Blasio destroy our city with their anti-law enforcement agenda. Don’t let them defund the NYPD.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=265A442A1A5821)
---

clean_body: Friends, Nicole just received the endorsement of the New York City Police Benevolent Association, the NYPD’s largest union of 50,000 members. | | | | | | | | | Friends- Nicole just received the endorsement of the New York City Police Benevolent Association, the NYPD’s largest union of 50,000 members. NYC PBA President Pat Lynch said: | | | | | | | "On behalf of the 50,000 members of the NYC PBA I am proud to endorse Assemblywoman Nicole Malliotakis in her campaign for New York State’s 11th Congressional District. Assemblywoman Malliotakis has always been a true friend of the NYPD and all law enforcement. She has stood by the men and women of the NYPD during her five terms in state legislature and continues to do so today, when many elected officials like incumbent Congressman Max Rose have joined the anti-police mob. This is the most hotly contested race in New York City this November and it creates the opportunity for our members, their families, friends and all supporters of the NYPD to send a resounding message to every elected official in New York City; law abiding New Yorkers are ready to take this city back." | | | | | | | "Her opponent, Congressman Max Rose, has claimed he supports law enforcement. But when it came time for him to stand tall and show that support, he chose the opposite. He chose to take part in a June demonstration on Staten Island where marchers carried signs reading, ‘Abolish the NYPD,’ ‘Blue Lives Murder’ and ‘Defund the Police’ as the crowd chanted those slogans and others as they converged on the 122nd Precinct. He chose to sign on to a bill that dumps all of the blame and liability for bad policing policies onto police officers on the street." "Congressman Rose, you can’t have it both ways. You made your choice. Now New York City police officers will make ours." | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Sincerely, Team Nicole | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | | PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL) Sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Nicole for New York, PO Box 60487, Staten Island, NY 10306, United States

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Reflecting On How Far We've Come
body:
|
---

| | Friend, Last week, I had the honor of speaking at the Democratic Convention on the night that Joe Biden accepted his party’s nomination for President of the United States. [You can watch the full speech here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18824179/241050100/-803653937?v=UFUW7gCOnnk&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjMvMS83NDAwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmM5ZDJlNS0yMmU2LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=meE5voBZbsDU_MMT_-H-tavc5HsrUoM3Q0UVmvJCymo=&emci=e55550ce-12e6-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=efc9d2e5-22e6-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=919990) I told Americans that this pandemic accelerated many of the trends I was concerned about when I was running for president. The future I warned about is now. We’re losing jobs that won’t come back. People are struggling to pay rent because their stimulus from spring was spent months ago. Most of us feel like our backs are against the wall and that this is the worst time we’ve ever experienced. We must give our country the chance to recover. That recovery is only possible with a change of leadership and new ideas. I said this to remind us that today’s American landscape isn’t normal, and that it doesn’t have to be like this. We can dig ourselves out of this deep, dark hole we have found ourselves in, and the first step should be with electing Joe and Kamala - two parents and patriots who want the best for our country. Addressing the nation in this crisis, when our people are looking to leaders for a way forward, is an experience I’ll never forget. It’s a moment that led me to reflect over the weekend on how far we’ve come together. We started out as a small team working out of an even smaller New York apartment. Every donation, every voter we persuaded and every interview with a reporter felt like a groundbreaking development. Before long, we were qualified to join the Democratic debate stage. It was our chance to reach millions of Americans. From there, we carried our message to thousands of people at rallies across the country and made people feel understood for the first time in too long. You knocked doors and called voters with us. You stormed the internet and contributed hard-earned dollars. Before long, we had stunned the people who didn’t see us coming. Now, our movement has evolved. And it speaks directly to this urgent moment. Universal Basic Income is no longer a policy for academics to muse about. It’s talked about in the halls of power now. It enjoys majority support among Americans. We did that. We’ve climbed the hilltop and told others what we’ve seen. It’s working. My gratitude for your enthusiasm and where it has taken us so far is not something I can measure. I do not know precisely where this movement will take us. What I do know is that we have yet to fully understand what is possible -- and that excites me about the future. Joe talks about possibilities. I can see the possibility of a more abundant tomorrow ahead for us. The better world is still possible. Come fight with me. Yours truly, -Andrew | |
---
|
---
| | PAID FOR BY: Humanity Forward PAC. PO BOX 15230, Washington DC 20003. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

| | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/e55550ce-12e6-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb/efc9d2e5-22e6-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjMvMS83NDAwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmM5ZDJlNS0yMmU2LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=meE5voBZbsDU_MMT_-H-tavc5HsrUoM3Q0UVmvJCymo=&id=101417283).

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: Nina Ahmad, a Biden Delegate attends Watch Party in Scranton!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
| | , Thank you for being a part of Nina For PA. The Democratic National Convention just wrapped up an awe-inspiring week! **Nina Ahmad was a Biden delegate** and a full participant, even traveling to Scranton to a watch party, sharing the joy of local community members as Joe Biden, son of Scranton accepted the nomination. The message was clear all week - We all must DO something different and roll up our sleeves. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/HolkydH3OIPQ1t5sMYJZvmRTCsQCEbD5jduyE2HM1EY=/8VabgVnk82k6c9krKIULShmA2g1_TFpAtKchUknRjIs=) Today, the Republicans start their convention which will be full of fear, lies, and division - The Trump Model. As the only scientist on the PA ticket, we must continue to get our message of embracing science and data over fear and division to the voters. We need [**_resources now_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/HolkydH3OIPQ1t5sMYJZvmRTCsQCEbD5jduyE2HM1EY=/3QWG4GLGFPXByahCj_XQ-yq2kDsi5IQIMTuG4qaqqfM=) more than ever to defeat Trump in the fall. Will you stand with me NOW and send a message to the RNC that PA will be BLUE and Nina Ahmad will be the next Auditor General of PA? **[Whether it's $5, $10, $100 or more, your support will help us to turn PA BLUE. Can I count on you to inspire others?](https://act.myngp.com/el/HolkydH3OIPQ1t5sMYJZvmRTCsQCEbD5jduyE2HM1EY=/3QWG4GLGFPXByahCj_XQ-yq2kDsi5IQIMTuG4qaqqfM=)** Thank you in advance and I look forward to moving PA forward, Dr. Nina

subject: Join James Carville, President Clinton's campaign manager and political pundit in support of John Carney
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends for John Carney |
body:
Please join Join James Carville, President Clinton's Campaign Manager and Political Pundit in support of Governor Carney's re-election campaign for a virtual event.

Thursday, August 27, 2020
6:00 - 7:00 p.m.
Via Zoom
Login information will be sent to RSVPs week-of event

Suggested Contribution Levels: $1200 * $600 * $300

You can RSVP online by using this link: www.johncarney.org/carville or you can contact our campaign office by phone, 302-395-0707, or email, rsvp@johncarney.org.

Checks should be made payable to Friends For John Carney and mailed to:
Friends for John Carney, P.O. Box 2162, Wilmington, DE 19899

Team Carney

The Friends for John Carney Campaign may accept contributions from individuals, corporations, labor organizations, partnerships, and other entities up to $1,200 per election period. Contributions are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

Only individuals who are American citizens or permanent resident aliens that reside in the United States may contribute. In addition, only corporations who are incorporated in the United States, who utilize U.S. proceeds for the contribution, and for which the decision to contribute was made by an American citizen or permanent resident alien may contribute.

Contributions from corporations, companies, organizations, incorporated or unincorporated associations, general or limited partnerships, or other entities that contribute must:
- Include the full names and mailing addresses of all individuals who own a legal or equitable interest of 50% or greater in that entity, or notify us that no such person exists (the entity’s contribution is allocated pro-rata to identified persons, subject to limits);
-Include a responsible party if the aggregate amount of contributions during the election period exceeds $100; and
-Include the following form: http://elections.delaware.gov/pubs/cf_corporate_contribution_notice.pdf.

---------------------------------------------
| Paid for by Friends for John Carney |

New Castle DE 19720 United States

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a2b846041dab/big-news?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| | I am proud to announce that the Sierra Club has endorsed my campaign for Congress! **This is huge.** The Sierra Club is a household name in the fight for a cleaner planet and is the oldest grassroots environmental organization in the United States. I am especially proud of this endorsement because of what the 16th district looks like. This district is home to beautiful fields, prairies, lakes, rivers, canyons, and valleys. Unfortunately, the 16th is also home to 14 environmental disaster superfund sites, where the air, soil, and water are polluted. Once elected, I promise to do everything in my power as your representative from IL16 to fight for greater environmental protections. [It’s important that we keep this momentum going. Can you chip in to my campaign in the fight to flip IL-16?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=a18ab08579&e=140a9b81e7) “We are proud to endorse Dani because she will help to lead the fight against climate change and bring us into a 100% clean energy future,” said Steven Hall, Chair of the Sierra Club’s Northwest River Valleys Group. **“Unlike her opponent, we know that Dani cannot be bought by the fossil fuel lobby.”** My Republican opponent has accepted over $300,000 from the oil and gas industry. **That is unacceptable.** That is also why I need your support. Though I may not have the backing of fossil fuel companies, I do have you. [Make a contribution today to defeat one of Big Oil’s favorite House allies.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=dda09a062a&e=140a9b81e7) Dani Brzozowski Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

name: Team MJ Hegar
subject: What's on your ballot?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
There is a lot riding on this election.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fed/7f51f7bc/43ff241b/4ef7de74/678628076/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | **Here are just a few of the things on the ballot this November, Peter:**
1. Sustained COVID-19 relief efforts
2. Protections for pre-existing health conditions
3. Common-sense gun safety legislation
4. **MJ and control of the Senate --[will you pitch in to flip the Senate and to finally make progress on all of the issues we care about?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fed/7f51f7bc/43ff241b/4ef7de6a/678628076/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200824.1NAT.nd__1961__&amount=10")**

**We've seen bills _continue_ to pile up on Mitch McConnell's desk as he refuses to take action on the crises we face --** bills to provide unemployment insurance and money to combat COVID-19, combat climate change, lower the cost of prescription medicine, protect voting rights, fight the gun violence epidemic. **McConnell and Senator Cornyn won't act -- so we will.**

We NEED to elect MJ, flip the Senate, and kick out Sens. Cornyn and McConnell, or we're just going to see more inaction. **[Are you in? Will you help us elect MJ and tackle the crises facing America?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fed/7f51f7bc/43ff241b/4ef7de6a/678628076/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200824.1NAT.nd__1961__&amount=10")** \-- Team MJ

| [DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fed/7f51f7bc/43ff241b/4ef7de6a/678628076/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200824.1NAT.nd__1961__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fed/7f51f7bc/43ff241b/4ef7de68/678628076/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1961&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fed/7f51f7bc/43ff241b/4ef7de6e/678628076/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

clean_body: There is a lot riding on this election. | "" | | Here are just a few of the things on the ballot this November, Peter: 1. Sustained COVID-19 relief efforts 2. Protections for pre-existing health conditions 3. Common-sense gun safety legislation 4. MJ and control of the Senate -- "" We've seen bills continue to pile up on Mitch McConnell's desk as he refuses to take action on the crises we face -- bills to provide unemployment insurance and money to combat COVID-19, combat climate change, lower the cost of prescription medicine, protect voting rights, fight the gun violence epidemic. McConnell and Senator Cornyn won't act -- so we will. We NEED to elect MJ, flip the Senate, and kick out Sens. Cornyn and McConnell, or we're just going to see more inaction. "" \-- Team MJ | "" | | It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. "" However, we know this is not an easy time for many. name: Betsy Rader
subject: How extreme can Ohio get?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/EAdGr2NhBiBEN2salGC3VA15fFYtZ37KYKUCaJw9RCA=/2WSgqgl0ZGZZUZVqahOMg207MGVQk76P_wp7t9_A870=)
* * *
**The Republican extremists in our legislature will impeach their own Governor for trying to protect our health, but they won 't kick their corrupt Speaker Householder out of the statehouse. **And they're in good company with my opponent, who called the Governor's orders "_home enslavement._ " This is what happens when you have one-party rule created by gerrymandering. It is not enough to replace Donald Trump in the White House if our states are full of extremists, who not only refuse to work across the aisle, but will try to forcibly remove members of their own party if they won't adopt their extreme ideologies. Things CAN get worse if more of these extremists are elected this Fall. We must elect those who will listen to science and do what is best for the people, regardless of party. [**Please make a $15 donation to support my race today-- to bring balance, sense, and democracy to our government at all levels.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/EAdGr2NhBiBEN2salGC3VA15fFYtZ37KYKUCaJw9RCA=/8aBOgvOZiGF7q8zMbfNtzq-uE5O1wRfYb-WEvnKkvzg=?refcode=8.24&amount=15) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/EAdGr2NhBiBEN2salGC3VA15fFYtZ37KYKUCaJw9RCA=/JRFGk-zkfS3xA2Wn2VbD-dq0hIrtTHkmuOGKI9ZV83k=?refcode=8.24)

It is not enough to replace Donald Trump in the White House if our states are full of extremists, who not only refuse to work across the aisle, but will try to forcibly remove members of their own party if they won't adopt their extreme ideologies. Things CAN get worse if more of these extremists are elected this Fall. ---
| | Trump put one of his top cronies in charge of the United States Postal Service — _**and he’s completely gutted it:**_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18826621/241096298/-1531463889?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTMyOGJmNi0zMmU2LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k3cgbDRtuCi42jOzjZik5x_iOQk7SXQftRhjdcKSPhg=&emci=c60c1575-1fe6-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=de328bf6-32e6-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=6233172) **Postmaster General DeJoy removed sorting machines across the country** — causing widespread delays and raising an alarm about the Postal Service’s ability to handle election mail this fall. And while he’s pausing the changes for now, _he refuses to restore the sorting machines he’s removed already._ [**That’s why we’re calling on the Senate to fully fund the Postal Service and protect the integrity of our elections today →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18826622/241096299/-1531463889?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTMyOGJmNi0zMmU2LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k3cgbDRtuCi42jOzjZik5x_iOQk7SXQftRhjdcKSPhg=&emci=c60c1575-1fe6-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=de328bf6-32e6-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=6233172) | | | [Fund USPS! →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18826623/241096300/-1531463889?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTMyOGJmNi0zMmU2LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k3cgbDRtuCi42jOzjZik5x_iOQk7SXQftRhjdcKSPhg=&emci=c60c1575-1fe6-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=de328bf6-32e6-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=6233172)

Team Siegel

Friend,

I’m proud that the first television ad from my campaign features the two most influential people in my life.
[ ](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=b8697324718f41d5aedfe8d5208f1c45&_e=lUqG_idPNN2jbQO_MZGTx1MDXCdgRZ-QtiiCjECO854yhqmbnWlTIRq2mkHd6Kha4DjoRJdGaFYi8v9z7OyChENLLDXWsKNsupCJ25rXeG4TxpYDdIqIeReHLt2pXWVnUvF589YpDDpWRx2MBPtQS0KhLspP4ce6FVmdk9X21zuvK4cNEVkCO_Gk1QKAS7MfCsqddS8V2jCK-TN884q6NgyXPKP_iCxvRFOr9uZYv-GEu8ANcmOtdwje1Oc-cOxiTzznPhWoIq_8D84SRY0CeVS81VvvKAtwrJSyZgJqaP7aYqSldfl71BZleObIEvheIyCYd9xAGN_BXEgmMPlE_OuWSnowvV-m9TwCLZEG4ZJoudF8aN7SoJsBVNsQp4DKqopd-KRgBzUAhqQe0fSqFlLe_uWjkM5nH2LCjSOCpgI%3D)
My father, General James Mace earned the Distinguished Service Cross and is The Citadel’s most decorated living graduate.

My mother, Anne Mace, was a teacher and is a wonderful mother.

I learned my Lowcountry values from them.

They have helped shape me into the person I am today - the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, a successful businesswoman, a loving mother, and a strong state legislator.

I’m running for Congress because talk is cheap but Lowcountry values run deep. Not only will I bring my strong leadership skills to Washington, but I’ll bring the values that I grew up with to ensure that your voice is heard.

Help me spread this message across South Carolina’s First Congressional District. **[Watch and share my first television ad.](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=b8697324718f41d5aedfe8d5208f1c45&_e=lUqG_idPNN2jbQO_MZGTx1MDXCdgRZ-QtiiCjECO854yhqmbnWlTIRq2mkHd6Kha4DjoRJdGaFYi8v9z7OyChENLLDXWsKNsupCJ25rXeG4TxpYDdIqIeReHLt2pXWVnUvF589YpDDpWRx2MBPtQS0KhLspP4ce6FVmdk9X21zuvK4cNEVkCO_Gk1QKAS7MfCsqddS8V2jCK-TN884q6NplekG8pjcyRm5bmdpPG04gGMOlMAQ5M2HFmDM-G5YX8XFglUcyNMlMJ9HaXQQJWNXlWCP9mUnQm7uCM1ZwJpdC8VbHiunp1RCLtGgFQjfqIBcCFr7qvrwhhaivV7k9J3oYm1dx24Xj8x1HZdnWNW8hD1BMA-EUf5y8jnCeAO3mWVqRXsTiiMdan-Ra9oAIMYkB3wAS0qhiAbP8_uiCSpNw%3D)**

name: Clarke Tucker
subject: Calling all volunteers!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Clarke Tucker for State Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/A4Dsfl4YJuvfkVaEA8IOL6-XElJxjjjXTfEimsVo47c=/gVyrujqGA7KaLE9V5RDIatJnYXet7X5yx8JPHYWRo9o=)

Dear Friend,

My favorite part of campaigning is going door to door, meeting my neighbors where they are, and hearing what's on their minds. Well, sadly, we won't be able to do that this fall.

We will still be working hard to reach as many voters as we can, and we need your help. We will be making phone calls (from your own home), dropping doorhangers (for those looking to get their steps in), delivering yard signs, and more.

It would be an honor to work side-by-side with you as we build a better future for our state. Even if it's just an hour per week, your time will make a huge difference and help power this campaign. Click the link below or contact our Field Director, Anna Gayle, by texting 501-425-8330 or emailing agaylegriffiths@yahoo.com.

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/A4Dsfl4YJuvfkVaEA8IOL6-XElJxjjjXTfEimsVo47c=/gVyrujqGA7KaLE9V5RDIatJnYXet7X5yx8JPHYWRo9o=)

And of course, **you can also ****[donate to our campaign here](https://act.myngp.com/el/A4Dsfl4YJuvfkVaEA8IOL6-XElJxjjjXTfEimsVo47c=/_9Wn5fGe_3KNf4v4jYj3gk2_XwnuXDq9H9LKGEtWogs=)**[**.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/A4Dsfl4YJuvfkVaEA8IOL6-XElJxjjjXTfEimsVo47c=/_9Wn5fGe_3KNf4v4jYj3gk2_XwnuXDq9H9LKGEtWogs=)

Thank you for your continued support and for working with me to change this state through the State Senate. With your help, we will win this race and make a difference in the lives of Arkansas families.

Gratefully,

Clarke

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: A unified approach to schools
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Since the first days of this crisis, the Rhode Island National Guard has been front-and-center to our response. We were the first state to have the National Guard staffing drive-through testing sites, and they've been integral in everything from contact tracing, to outbreak response, to congregate setting support and more. The same has been true when it comes to preparing to get back to school. From facility readiness to transportation guidance, the men and women under General Callahan's leadership have been working around the clock to get us ready to get back to school safely. As you may know, whenever we have a snowstorm, a hurricane, or another major statewide event, we stand up what's called the EOC - the Emergency Operations Center. Today, I'm excited to announce that we're launching a different type of EOC - an Education Operations Center (EdOC).
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001swLWkSOxOzHEWhufQOh0E6STTZFxpQ90UvsdDWogjAebULRy9UDaEnRyRA6JKYB6fOfwyYZXVoUzHeymqbJ2f9mLse4B11onYVNgNrNNrj0WsP0FCiI02uGc9HUonU-qJUdqiYUYtYr2efkNhSEkqu-JCyn-qngk7YzXQ0440Rw_NRc_kDCJ5x1js7ZGAZ1juoIFxh1Boh8=&c=F1xS2YDudjidxXM0fe0zd0a7un18dbAEsUWlXVlcE3VfI2qKBZzNMw==&ch=zWZU-5wDs8zLyjZ05TgU3KYRDiBJQvbkTqrypYPuO7EANZsJkELq2g==)
---
| Just like the emergency operations center, this EdOC will be staffed by people across state agencies - RIDE, RIDOH, DOT, RIPTA, EMA, and others - and will be entirely focused on providing real-time support to our schools, drawing on the operational expertise of the National Guard. The slide below illustrates the unified and innovative approach we're taking, both to getting schools open safely and to providing support to school districts once they've opened:
---
|
---
| This operations center will be ready and able to assist with anything our schools need. If they're running low on hand sanitizer or masks, this team will immediately arrange for the supplies they need. If they need logistical support to ensure strong in-person learning, this team will be able to provide assistance. When they have a student or staff member who tests positive, this team will be on the ground to test, isolate and quarantine, preventing a large outbreak just as we have done with child care and congregate care settings over the past few months. The EdOC is activated as of today. By next week, every school district will have a designated point-of-contact, and we will ensure frequent lines of communication between districts and the EdOC. The EdOC will ramp up over the next few weeks with recognition of several milestones, including the return of teachers on the 9th and the return of students on the 14th. Once schools are open, the leaders at the EdOC will be prepared to deploy assistance teams to any school - in any city or town - on a moment's notice.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001swLWkSOxOzHEWhufQOh0E6STTZFxpQ90UvsdDWogjAebULRy9UDaEkrNR7nRumV4g1zus4YKg7PCv_KPXZSgVZ8byBPIWOf2Fa1E_7BZzY3w4ctm7H_RvhaqHBIwgcZtBTZWybo2ONEX4CE1mc5AtH5ZBKNrCTsO_16K9VxVVQHQCe1G-1p6z8pR5W_N25yVql_rK07Ivxw=&c=F1xS2YDudjidxXM0fe0zd0a7un18dbAEsUWlXVlcE3VfI2qKBZzNMw==&ch=zWZU-5wDs8zLyjZ05TgU3KYRDiBJQvbkTqrypYPuO7EANZsJkELq2g==)
---

clean_body: Your RI COVID-19 News Update | | | | | | | Hello friend, Since the first days of this crisis, the Rhode Island National Guard has been front-and-center to our response. We were the first state to have the National Guard staffing drive-through testing sites, and they've been integral in everything from contact tracing, to outbreak response, to congregate setting support and more. The same has been true when it comes to preparing to get back to school. From facility readiness to transportation guidance, the men and women under General Callahan's leadership have been working around the clock to get us ready to get back to school safely. As you may know, whenever we have a snowstorm, a hurricane, or another major statewide event, we stand up what's called the EOC - the Emergency Operations Center. Today, I'm excited to announce that we're launching a different type of EOC - an Education Operations Center (EdOC). | == | Just like the emergency operations center, this EdOC will be staffed by people across state agencies - RIDE, RIDOH, DOT, RIPTA, EMA, and others - and will be entirely focused on providing real-time support to our schools, drawing on the operational expertise of the National Guard. The slide below illustrates the unified and innovative approach we're taking, both to getting schools open safely and to providing support to school districts once they've opened: | | This operations center will be ready and able to assist with anything our schools need. If they're running low on hand sanitizer or masks, this team will immediately arrange for the supplies they need. If they need logistical support to ensure strong in-person learning, this team will be able to provide assistance. When they have a student or staff member who tests positive, this team will be on the ground to test, isolate and quarantine, preventing a large outbreak just as we have done with child care and congregate care settings over the past few months. The EdOC is activated as of today. By next week, every school district will have a designated point-of-contact, and we will ensure frequent lines of communication between districts and the EdOC. The EdOC will ramp up over the next few weeks with recognition of several milestones, including the return of teachers on the 9th and the return of students on the 14th. Once schools are open, the leaders at the EdOC will be prepared to deploy assistance teams to any school - in any city or town - on a moment's notice. | == | Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's ==. | I'm proud of the Rhode Island men and women who have answered the call to service and are helping with our COVID-19 response. With their help, we'll be able to keep our students and staff safe this fall, no matter what happens. We're all in this together, -Gina Raimondo Governor | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov powered by

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Plasma Therapy a Promising Step in Fight Against Coronavirus
body:
On Sunday, President Trump announced the Food and Drug Administration is issuing an emergency use authorization for (EUA) convalescent plasma | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a72c698aaa&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Plasma Therapy a Promising Step in Fight Against Coronavirus**

“On Sunday, President Trump announced the Food and Drug Administration is issuing an emergency use authorization for (EUA) convalescent plasma in hospitalized patients, another step forward in the fight against COVID-19,” Dr. Nicole Saphier writes for Fox News.

“It may not be the magic ticket to end the pandemic, but can it save lives if sufficient quantities of IgG [antibodies] are given early enough? Data from over 30,000 people in the study suggest so. And because of that, every American should be rejoicing.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=864565774d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| Today, President Trump will visit Flavor 1st Growers and Packers, who earlier this year “partnered with Baptists on Mission to help fulfill the mission of Farmers to Families, a $3 billion U.S. Department of Agriculture program that buys food from farmers that would otherwise go uneaten,” Mackensy Lunsford reports in the [_Asheville Citizen-Times_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=423be9de55&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “As the economy recovers, it is essential that low-income workers can resume the great trajectory of opportunity they were on before the pandemic hit. Nearly 8,800 disadvantaged communities, home to approximately 35 million low-income individuals, are already seeing billions of dollars in new investments due to their status as ‘opportunity zones,’” write HUD Secretary Ben Carson and White House Domestic Policy Council Director Brooke Rollins for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9e84058f4c&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Catholic schools are reopening for classroom instruction in Chicago—that is, unless the teachers union can get the politicians to shut them down . . . Unions fear that they’ll look bad if private schools open successfully while keeping Covid-19 contained. The decent approach should be to wish them success,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=271db69862&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e8bc9a0914&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=69ad1ee46e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=2a2af49558)
---

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: If Mark Warner loses, Democrats could lose the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good VA
body:
| | |
Derek,
After watching my friends Joe, Kamala, Barack and Michelle speak last week, I’m more fired up than ever about helping Democrats win up and down the ballot this November. Here in Virginia, there’s nothing more important than making sure Mark Warner defeats his Trump-clone opponent Republican Daniel Gade. Twice now, Gade has doubled down on Donald Trump’s lies about voting by mail. Like Trump, Gade knows he can’t win if it’s a fair election -- now, just like Trump, he’s trying to suppress the vote. We can’t let it happen. **[Can you contribute $27 or more right now to support Mark Warner’s reelection campaign?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xBrMwVGoYJzkGpGm5GaOC4G3Uejbfjaox1yXl86grMxrA50hRZwhIarqC783XvgL6e8-n6_pcUsqMTpVyNK5R-71o0ARfL6O8u31qoWLETzlpe5OEEKLVesjNAl02cQYpwWAbZnjtYuXWpo7Wvrz1ADw4KxLCWAtV77wkViape46ANCEfkwOt2sWmxWvQQzW76PM7R_8TODBpSWRYwCgT8BwJxoFVicZCcbiKfBGbMfAR7WfZ4YmLcBfNG5CAZbwLT4dtgQYtMeQfWYvtRsOWQiy8bpRJ5T14jZko8kNkkFyAYS8n4-KbbxExY2X1nL6eO_a-Y3z4KXdJxENhipKiMolbdWHySpZnC_M3H0MRkkcm8VUFig6UXdLYFSaHwDAI/34l/HHErX5ZoTHGaydX8yOueeA/h0/I004q_6HNgDOdRCfF-7OyqttTpijyeZpdvWsKMEsRTg)** Mark and I have worked closely together for years and there’s one thing we’ve both seen over and over again -- Virginia elections are always close. This year, it’s especially important that we not be complacent. Nate Silver’s 538 says we have no chance to take back the Senate if Mark loses. Worse still, Virginians will be stuck with another Trump and McConnell rubber stamp representing us in the senate. With this triumvirate of bozos in power, all of the progressive gains we’ve fought for will simply be wiped away. **[Mark Warner has been there for us, now let’s make sure we’re there for him. Please donate right now to make sure Mark gets reelected.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xBrMwVGoYJzkGpGm5GaOC4G3Uejbfjaox1yXl86grMxrA50hRZwhIarqC783XvgL6e8-n6_pcUsqMTpVyNK5R-PeMLAABHN76kmyGUQFSJ8KlQTpWhZjGmv063bva3SbOk_oO0-_uO3J9WDfpyrSw9OE1G4UZ9xtNCe405_2-pTpYhvKJ3Fb0pNP6ECGsi0FtGfcvz7UKiP3wOzklsY8ncVvEix1NMAnZpK951JktgyoHMSVwlM_YtsbRxNYT2_PUaiR_SOb9NZdGXdIbZ7RXRw3g9KopbF06OKb-FLyj418TL0PA3cK6-MfrqY1H1ScIB6w945e566GAFo3JihvkEeMwFR-I7MCilxORcgSfeZnnG70yNn3YbOVv2WPNUsjU/34l/HHErX5ZoTHGaydX8yOueeA/h1/vjarqg86IzptrHsxt-Wz9KkneRCQyBgaTZFI050QvS0) ** Thank you, Terry

An exciting new endorsement for Jon. |

Friend,

Gun violence is a public health crisis in our nation.

We need leaders who will stand up to the corrupt political influence of weapons manufacturers and their lobbyists to fight for common-sense gun safety solutions that will save lives.

**That's why we're so honored that the Brady PAC has endorsed Jon Ossoff for Senate!**

As part of one of the nation's oldest gun violence prevention grassroots organizations, the Brady PAC knows that Jon will stand up to the gun lobby and do what's best for all Georgians.

| | Peter, I lost.

I lost to Republican Don Bacon in 2018 by a devastatingly slim margin.

[**_Now I have an unprecedented opportunity to unseat him in 2020. * Because while Don Bacon has been chasing corporate PAC donations, I have raised hundreds of thousands of dollars from everyday Americans like you.

I decided to run again because I know the hardworking Americans who supported me haven't given up.

So I won't give up either.

Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e811/77d4c309/21849949/26361624/3619990245/VEsHBw/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e811/77d4c309/21849949/26361627/3619990245/VEsHBg/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e811/77d4c309/21849949/26361626/3619990245/VEsHAQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

7117 Farnam St, Ste. 2, Omaha, NE 68132
info@eastmanforcongress.com

| | Paid for by Eastman for Congress

name: Tracy Newman
subject: Loren Culp doesn't care about the health of kids, families, or educators
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
The stakes are too high to fail.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8128%2E868730%2EteHAjB) Friend, It's a tale of two candidates -- one who wants to keep kids, families, and educators safe: "Inslee, health officials release new recommendations for reopening schools" - _The Spokesman-Review_ And one who doesn't care about the health of kids, families, or educators: "Culp urges students to return to school, with or without masks" - _The Spokesman-Review_ We've all seen the pictures of crowded hallways in Georgia and colleges like UNC and Notre Dame sending kids home after just two weeks when COVID cases in students and faculty spiked. This is a hard decision for every parent, every student, and every teacher -- but this moment demands steady leaders who thoughtfully weigh the toughest decisions. And, in the end, puts science and puts our lives ahead. Loren Culp is reckless and dangerous, and that's not who we need leading us in a crisis. Jay Inslee is the steady, moral leader Washington state needs and the rest of the country looks to for guidance -- we need to fight hard to make sure we don't lose in November. The stakes are simply too high. **[Will you donate $5 or more to support Jay's reelection today and show that you support science-based leadership over fear and divisiveness?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10857?t=4&akid=8128%2E868730%2EteHAjB)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10858?t=5&akid=8128%2E868730%2EteHAjB)

name: Sandy Smith
subject: We need to keep God
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=im_mYDh6F3Nxmng&b=SuTXvEVKN78Bhd1fMKq09g)
---

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. **

I am a patriot and a Christian! I have been greatly blessed by God, and so I kneel before Him in thanks. I think that's the least I can do.
_**The anti-American Democrats, on the other hand, do not. **_
There have been all kinds of kooky things in this Democrat Convention. Elizabeth Warren headlining a "Native American panel" (!!!!). Kamala Harris, telling America that women could trust Joe Biden- someone she implied was a sexual assaulter.
But the weirdest thing? The Democrats booting God from their convention.
_Two delegates at the Democratic National Convention omitted the words "under God" when they recited the Pledge of Allegiance during caucus meetings this week._
_"I pledge allegiance to the flag of the United States of America. And to the republic for which it stands. One nation, indivisible, with liberty and justice for all," delegate A.J. Durrani said during the DNC's virtual assembly of Muslim delegates and allies._
_Another delegate also omitted the words during the LGBTQ caucus meeting on Tuesday. The delegate paused for a beat, then proceeded with the pledge._
**_Taking aside how Democrats only see Americans by their liberal labels (Muslims, gays, etc), apparently the only group they don't cater to is.... Christians?_**
**_This is so dangerous. This is the reason why the Dems are ok with some lives mattering more than others. They have no values to fall back on, no moral code._**
For my sake, however, I go back to what George Washington, the founder of our country, said about the Bible:
**_“It is the duty of all nations to acknowledge the providence of Almighty God, to obey His will, to be grateful for His benefits, and humbly to implore His protection and favor.”_**
**_– George Washington_**
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=im_mYDh6F3Nxmng&b=PJWIrcaxYO0RuGr3Sv3rZQ)
---
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=im_mYDh6F3Nxmng&b=PJWIrcaxYO0RuGr3Sv3rZQ)
---

_But the Dems? The only thing they kneel for is Socialism!_

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=im_mYDh6F3Nxmng&b=PJWIrcaxYO0RuGr3Sv3rZQ)
---

**_It is clear that the Democrats hate people of faith. They particularly hate Christians, and they want to keep us from exercising our Constitutionally-protected Freedom of Religion. _**

You cannot govern a nation without faith. You cannot govern a nation without morals or humility, but that's what the Dems are trying to do.

_Socialism is their "god", and abortion is their sacrament._

_The Left wants to play God and tell us which lives matter more than others. Which deserve to live and which deserve to die._

**That's not right! We are all God's children and Americans- and we need to see each other equally and kneel before God!**

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=im_mYDh6F3Nxmng&b=PJWIrcaxYO0RuGr3Sv3rZQ), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda.

G.K. Butterfield is a Swampy radical, not a patriot, but to replace him I [really need your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=im_mYDh6F3Nxmng&b=PJWIrcaxYO0RuGr3Sv3rZQ). Our country needs fighters like you and me. Let's stand up now, before it's too late!

clean_body: | | | Dear Peter, I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. I am a patriot and a Christian! I have been greatly blessed by God, and so I kneel before Him in thanks. I think that's the least I can do. The anti-American Democrats, on the other hand, do not. There have been all kinds of kooky things in this Democrat Convention. Elizabeth Warren headlining a "Native American panel" (!!!!). Kamala Harris, telling America that women could trust Joe Biden- someone she implied was a sexual assaulter. But the weirdest thing? The Democrats booting God from their convention. Two delegates at the Democratic National Convention omitted the words "under God" when they recited the Pledge of Allegiance during caucus meetings this week. "I pledge allegiance to the flag of the United States of America. And to the republic for which it stands. One nation, indivisible, with liberty and justice for all," delegate A.J. Durrani said during the DNC's virtual assembly of Muslim delegates and allies. Another delegate also omitted the words during the LGBTQ caucus meeting on Tuesday. The delegate paused for a beat, then proceeded with the pledge. Taking aside how Democrats only see Americans by their liberal labels (Muslims, gays, etc), apparently the only group they don't cater to is.... Christians? This is so dangerous. This is the reason why the Dems are ok with some lives mattering more than others. They have no values to fall back on, no moral code. For my sake, however, I go back to what George Washington, the founder of our country, said about the Bible: “It is the duty of all nations to acknowledge the providence of Almighty God, to obey His will, to be grateful for His benefits, and humbly to implore His protection and favor.” – George Washington But the Dems? The only thing they kneel for is Socialism! It is clear that the Democrats hate people of faith. They particularly hate Christians, and they want to keep us from exercising our Constitutionally-protected Freedom of Religion. You cannot govern a nation without faith. You cannot govern a nation without morals or humility, but that's what the Dems are trying to do. Socialism is their "god", and abortion is their sacrament. name: Bill Olson
subject: Trump is right about the media
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i5A4gzNnMF6OuRU&b=89WuvGVB5X8oBk.HRAcdJA

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just overwhelmingly won my primary, by 20 points! I am the new Republican nominee, running to take back Florida’s competitive 9th District, currently held by Socialist Democrat Darren Soto. And I will stand shoulder to shoulder with President Trump as we fight far-Left Socialism!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i5A4gzNnMF6OuRU&b=89WuvGVB5X8oBk.HRAcdJA

The President loves trolling the left-wing media, we all know this, but he delivered a zinger this weekend.

During a Sunday press conference, President Donald Trump took a shot at the general left-wing bend of mainstream reporters by telling them that he hoped they all had a “great weekend” at their “convention,” referencing the Democratic National Convention (DNC).

“It’s good to see you all,” the president said to the press. “Hope you had a great weekend at your convention.”

Though there were rough ratings for the DNC, which was virtual due to coronavirus precautions, the media found themselves praising the convention.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i5A4gzNnMF6OuRU&b=89WuvGVB5X8oBk.HRAcdJA

The media fawned all over the awful Democrat Convention last week. Made fools of themselves, really.

“And then Michelle Obama starts talking, and we’re all like – none of us breathed for 18 minutes,” Maddow said.

Chief Washington correspondent for Politico and senior political analyst for CNN Ryan Lizza was even more open about his feelings for former President Barack Obama’s convention speech.

“Barack Obama just delivered the finest convention speech in modern history (again),” Lizza gushed on Twitter. “Spell-binding, chilling, optimistic, beautifully written, and expertly delivered. Incredible moment.”

These clowns are destroying our Republic with their open partisanship. the "thrill up their leg" approach to political analysis.

Really, they just hate us, our freedom, our country. They hold the American people in complete and open contempt.

Here's the good news: The American people see it for what it is!

A new poll released on Tuesday shows Americans have a growing distrust of the media, with an overwhelming majority saying the press have a political bias and nearly half saying news outlets display a "great deal" of bias.

The study from Gallup and the Knight Foundation shows that a whopping 86 percent of Americans believe media outlets lean one way or another politically, with 49 percent saying there's "a great deal" of bias while 37 percent say "a fair amount."

The poll noted an increase in the percentage of Americans who see too much bias in ostensibly objective reporting as a "major problem." According to the poll, 73 percent of Americans share that belief, up from 65 percent in 2017.

Meanwhile, a stunning 84 percent of Americans agree that "the media is to blame for political division in this country," though the same percentage also believe the media "can serve as a healing force."

Nearly nine out of ten Americans say the divisions in our country are the fault of the media. They will keep destroying us - unless we do something this year!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i5A4gzNnMF6OuRU&b=89WuvGVB5X8oBk.HRAcdJA

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i5A4gzNnMF6OuRU&b=89WuvGVB5X8oBk.HRAcdJA

Darren Soto, Joe Biden, and the Socialist Democrats will be shoved down our throats by the left-wing media, despite the derangement of Antifa in the streets.

We patriots must fight now or our country and our freedoms will be lost. Will you stand with me

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i5A4gzNnMF6OuRU&b=89WuvGVB5X8oBk.HRAcdJA
?

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i5A4gzNnMF6OuRU&b=89WuvGVB5X8oBk.HRAcdJA

I'm an unapologetic patriot. Joe Biden won't stand up for our country. Darren Soto sure as heck won't- he votes with Pelosi 93% of the time!

But I have taken an oath to the Constitution- one that has no expiration date! I don't have big swampy PAC money, which is why I need your help to counter the media's lies!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i5A4gzNnMF6OuRU&b=89WuvGVB5X8oBk.HRAcdJA

I am calling all patriots to help me to replace Socialist Darren Soto, and stand up for our freedoms as Americans! I am now the official Republican nominee, and I need your help to win in November!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST Communism!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i5A4gzNnMF6OuRU&b=89WuvGVB5X8oBk.HRAcdJA

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i5A4gzNnMF6OuRU&b=89WuvGVB5X8oBk.HRAcdJA
This is a swing district and we can take it back!

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i5A4gzNnMF6OuRU&b=89WuvGVB5X8oBk.HRAcdJA
today? I have a goal of $50,000 raised by the end of August to get on the air asap. That's why I need your help today!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i5A4gzNnMF6OuRU&b=89WuvGVB5X8oBk.HRAcdJA

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i5A4gzNnMF6OuRU&b=89WuvGVB5X8oBk.HRAcdJA

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i5A4gzNnMF6OuRU&b=89WuvGVB5X8oBk.HRAcdJA
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i5A4gzNnMF6OuRU&b=89WuvGVB5X8oBk.HRAcdJA
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.
Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. name: Laura Loomer
subject: "Nightmare Apparition"
body:
They’re now calling me “nightmare” because . . . they’re scared.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-389741-918722-5156603-821a5271c6-2bf36e0411)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-389741-918722-5156603-821a5271c6-2bf36e0411) “Laura Loomer is a conspiracist in the paranoid American style, an unreconstructed guerrilla from the Internet culture war, and a nightmare apparition of our present and future politics.”
\-- _The New Yorker_
Yes, that was The New Yorker just a few days after my dominant primary victory last Tuesday.

They’re now calling me “nightmare” because . . . **they’re scared**.

>From CNN to CBS to even the Never Trumpers at the National Review (who called me a “virus”), know that when I’m sworn into Congress, Liberal Democrats will wake up in a cold sweat every night fearing that they’ll run into me in the halls of the Capitol.

Let’s make them sweat even more . . .

[Donate $10 today and help me run my latest ads defending me from the attacks coming from the Fake News Media.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-389741-918722-5156603-821a5271c6-2bf36e0411)

You’ve probably already heard what they’ve called me. Jake Tapper called me “a deranged bigot” on CNN, and the neo-Nazis on the Alt-Right called me a “plastic-faced heeb.”

The truth is, I’m a young Jewish woman who is not afraid to stand up to the Washington Establishment . . . and I’ve already done it countless times as an investigative journalist.

We’re 70 days from the election and we have so much work in front of us to counter these attacks.

We knew they were coming, and we’re prepared, and I could use your help to keep up the momentum and win in November.

[Donate $10 or whatever you can afford. Just $10 helps us reach 400 voters with a critical ad.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-389741-918722-5156603-821a5271c6-2bf36e0411)

Thank you again for all that you’ve done and continue to do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: Veterans for Scheller Coalition
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
**LISA SCHELLER RELEASE COALITION TODAY “VETERANS FOR SCHELLER”** FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Brooke Race
Info@schellerforcongress.com

**Allentown, Pa.** – Today, the Scheller Campaign is proud to announce its first coalition, Veterans for Scheller. Lisa Scheller strongly stands with, and is eternally grateful for, the brave men and women who have and currently serve our great country. Lisa is honored to have Shawn Welch chair Veterans for Scheller, Shawn was in the Army for 31 years as a Colonel. Thank you for your service. Shawn Welch released the following statement:

“Lisa has an in-depth understanding of and strongly supports issues that matter to veterans and those in service to our nation. She listens to these men and women and will work for effective solutions to the problems that plague veterans benefits. Lisa’s commitment to the veterans of the Lehigh Valley will be demonstrated by her donation of her congressional salary to Lehigh Valley veterans organizations. We strongly endorse and support Lisa Scheller for Congress.”

[**JOIN VETERANS FOR SCHELLER TODAY**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=31fa75f5018444868adc93b84a8a4fdd&_e=0E2oJYXl7TDQQCYuwrzP5rA6R4ASrFeashHLfjuIQ1MJymZQYLkuyhzKTOaBCPW6jU5RK-tn6jdrI8QAWs_FMn13NrKVK_lsLlD0JtyJUj13MFDoWE1vEAupz269kriCLJDjg0Gu1meWDakAWX2W9ykF3Caibv8iL0_j_GH2y5afsGyqbzNleux9dYPPYTZ4W2L5fq5zuADamd5_jX__OC2XxOByUVlqEN9uxH4s-LYfRlsWdtrLH8M3zv9mF9TaTxWZOkG_U19CW-cFNdR-mY4KiPSw-d41e9_hxtPdoOa5Q1d76zB_G7DrzZm2kDtN) Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc. body:

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Tina Smith
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Election Night 2016 was full of ugly surprises. But one of the most unexpected results was Minnesota -- Donald Trump only lost the state by about 1.5 percent. Ever since then, he's been | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852505a/45c30650/1c22cf026/66e83a08/3545870296/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Election Night 2016 was full of ugly surprises.

But one of the most unexpected results was Minnesota -- Donald Trump only lost the state by about _1.5 percent_. Ever since then, he's been fixated on adding Minnesota to his column, holding rally after rally and dumping money into the state.

**My friend Democratic Senator Tina Smith is up for re-election in Minnesota this year. And she's counting on this grassroots team to help her fight back against the GOP money flooding the state.**

**[We need to hold on to this Senate seat. So if you're able to make a donation at this time, please chip in $2 or whatever makes sense to help re-elect Tina Smith in Minnesota and support Warren Democrats.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852505a/45c30650/1c22cf026/66e83a0b/3545870296/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXRzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVUxM0ZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwODAyNF9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-ts?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU13F_EGR_END_E_202008024_V1S1_P")**

Since joining the Senate, Tina Smith has fought to protect Medicaid and women's health care, and to lower the cost of prescription drugs.

Tina also knows what it's like to be a working parent, and how crucial child care is to making it all work. We have that in common. The way Tina and I see it, child care is basic infrastructure, like roads and bridges and communications technology, that our whole economy relies on.

So a few months ago, Tina and I put our heads together on a plan to address the child care crisis that our country is going through during this pandemic.

We have proposed a $50 billion child care bailout for the next coronavirus relief package -- because we can't let child care providers be forced out of business, and we have to make sure parents can find safe, affordable, and high-quality child care.

**So take it from me: Tina Smith is exactly the type of fighter we need to stay in the U.S. Senate -- a fighter who knows how working families are struggling, and knows how to make things better.

But to win this November, she needs grassroots supporters like you to get in this fight.**

**[If you're able to, will you pitch in to help re-elect Tina Smith and elect Warren Democrats across the country?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852505a/45c30650/1c22cf026/66e83a0b/3545870296/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXRzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVUxM0ZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwODAyNF9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-ts?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU13F_EGR_END_E_202008024_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852505a/45c30650/1c22cf026/66e83a0b/3545870296/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXRzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVUxM0ZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwODAyNF9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-ts?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU13F_EGR_END_E_202008024_V1S1_P")
