name: Biden-Harris HQ
subject: One question for you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
The Republican National Convention starts today. |
---
Peter, the Republican National Convention starts today, and we know what to expect from Donald Trump and his party: lies, hatred, and more desperate attempts to distract from Trump's failed record.

What we don't know yet is what kind of audience Trump will have. So we're asking: [**Peter, are you planning to watch the Republican Convention?**](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_rncpoll_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_POLL_2020.08.24_B2_RNCpoll_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_POLL_2020.08.24_B2_RNCpoll_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&noskip=true") | | | [YES » ](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_rncpoll_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_POLL_2020.08.24_B2_RNCpoll_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_POLL_2020.08.24_B2_RNCpoll_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&noskip=true")

Thanks for letting us know!

_Biden-Harris HQ_
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7a2/1cd0ac28/16d22e136/357f1414/2831041863/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7a2/1cd0ac28/16d22e136/357f1413/2831041863/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7a2/1cd0ac28/16d22e136/357f1412/2831041863/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7a2/1cd0ac28/16d22e136/357f1411/2831041863/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7a2/1cd0ac28/16d22e136/357f1410/2831041863/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7a2/1cd0ac28/16d22e136/357f140f/2831041863/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7a2/1cd0ac28/16d22e136/357f140e/2831041863/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7a2/1cd0ac28/16d22e136/357f140d/2831041863/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7a2/1cd0ac28/16d22e136/357f140c/2831041863/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7a2/1cd0ac28/16d22e136/357f140b/2831041863/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7a2/1cd0ac28/16d22e136/357f140e/2831041863/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7a2/1cd0ac28/16d22e136/357f140a/2831041863/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7a2/1cd0ac28/16d22e136/357f140d/2831041863/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b7a2/1cd0ac28/16d22e136/357f1409/2831041863/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

|

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: $5 to make history in 71 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Below you'll find a longer and more personal note from Sri. If you've got a minute, we encourage you to read through the full email and hear directly from him on why we need your help more than ever. We're asking all supporters to step up with a $5 donation if they care about flipping this seat on November 3rd. If all of our supporters commit to this simple ask, we will be unstoppable. Donate here >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.24_SPK_b1_all&amount=15

Friend,

We’re 71 days away from the most important election of our lifetimes.

Consider this: in a little over two months, the future of our district -- the largest congressional district in the biggest swing state in the country -- will be determined by voters like you.

There are two very clear and very different paths that we can choose to take on Election Day. We can choose the path of continued division, of extreme ideologies funded by corruption and deceit.The path of politicians who are only in it for themselves and the special interests propping them up.

Or we can choose the path of reason and decency. The path of change. This campaign is unlike any other. Over the past three years, we have been building the most inclusive and diverse grassroots operation in the nation. We are building a coalition that reflects the district we are running in, which is the largest and most diverse district in the country. If we can win this way, we can prove to the world that dark money and special interests are no match for grassroots community engagement. We can start governing based on reason and the interests of the people, instead of political ideologies and special interests influence.

That’s why I’m running for Congress, friend -- and why, with just over two months left until our election, I’m asking you for your support.

We have only a few days to go until we reach September and the final two months of our campaign for change. Not only are we ramping up our campaign operations in the last two months, we’re also readying ourselves for the attacks that far-right dark money groups have been planning for the rest of the election cycle.

We know they’re building a well-funded war chest; in fact, they’ve earmarked $6.4 million in TV ads alone against us. That’s why, starting in early September, our campaign has a plan that will ensure we counter their ads across all platforms with our own positive message on bringing leadership to Washington to fight for our families.

We’re setting an incredibly ambitious end-of-month fundraising goal in order to raise the money for this effort, and we’re not relying on any dark corporate PAC money to get us there.

But in order to reach that goal and effectively fight back, we need your support now more than ever. That’s why I’m personally asking, if you can, to chip in $5 or whatever you can to jumpstart our end-of-month fundraising goal and ensure we’re ready for the final two months of this election.

Donate $5 or more to help us win: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.24_SPK_b1_all&amount=5

I’m grateful to have you in the fight, friend . With you by our side, I know that, on Election Day, we can and will choose the right path. We can bring the change to Washington that our families deserve -- and we will bring about the unity we need in our politics and our country.

Thank you,
Sri

Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our COVID-19 community resource guide [https://sri2020.com/covid-19-community-resources/] to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe.

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.
Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.24_SPK_b1_all&amount=15

Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at https://sri2020.com/

Paid for by Sri for Congress
SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]
If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/40d3b0a1-5ce6-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb/01ae8147-64e6-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWFlODE0Ny02NGU2LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TVi8EVFQfhUMneQmbm8cLbE_x9C5DrbTyb1gQ5WfP3Q=&id=117373579 .

name: Sean Grier
subject: 3 reasons to give right now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
How we can win in a competitive battleground ->
|
---

| | I can't stress enough the importance of our race:
1. NC-06 is one of the **top 10 congressional seats most likely to flip** in 2020, but a Democrat hasn't won here in three decades.

2. Kathy would be **the first woman to ever represent this district** in the House, and only six women have ever represented North Carolina in the House.

3. North Carolina is one of**the most competitive and expensive battlegrounds** in the entire country.

The fact is winning in a battleground as competitive as North Carolina requires resources. The end-of-month deadline is only a week away and we've seen a major slowdown in contributions since moving our organizing efforts online. [**_Kathy isn 't taking any corporate PAC money. She's counting on our grassroots support to reach voters in the Triad in these final weeks before Election Day. If you can, chip in today. Even $1 helps._**](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2b2/3d199a51/2fa1fc1c/7364bc9f/3335023629/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDgyNCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200824?refcode=kme200824_m_other&refcode2=17426") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2b2/3d199a51/2fa1fc1c/7364bc9c/3335023629/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDgyNCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200824?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=kme200824_m_&refcode2=17426")

body:
Here's how we're getting through the RNC.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=2413%2E53494%2EB_P-bW) Friend, The Republican National Convention kicks off tonight, and while I don't have a crystal ball, I can say one thing with certainty: This is not going to be a great week for bold climate action. But that doesn't mean we can't have a little fun, right? **[Join Team Evergreen in playing Republican National Convention Climate Bingo starting tonight! Play along all week, and click here to share the game with your friends on Facebook.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/763?t=3&akid=2413%2E53494%2EB_P-bW)** [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/763?t=4&akid=2413%2E53494%2EB_P-bW) Will Republicans claim "windmills" cause cancer? Complain about weak showerheads? Or, worst of all, ignore the greatest existential crisis we've ever faced? Tune in to the convention, with our game at hand, to find out -- and if you need a little liquid courage, we won't judge. Cheers, Rainee Taylor

name: Perdue Recess Confirmation Alert | Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: Reservation #2020GA to Sea Island
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Sen. David Perdue is on summer recess! |
---
Friend,

Over 170,000 Americans are dead. Tens of millions have lost their jobs. Expanded unemployment insurance has run out. PPP loans have stopped. Banks and landlords are threatening foreclosure and eviction.

**Is Senator David Perdue in Washington, fighting to secure vital relief for working families and small businesses?**

**No. He went home for a month.** [](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2442/5b2c1286/3f9cde28/25f06a82/1436681158/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_22_perdue_vaca?refcode=em_2020_08_24_perdue_vaca_img") **Friend, amid this public health and economic disaster, Mitch McConnell, David Perdue, and the Senate are on recess.**

**Georgia deserves a Senator who will do his job and fight to help the people he represents -- not go home at the first opportunity.**

Perdue should fly back to Washington and get to work.

Leadership matters.

**[Chip in today to elect Jon Ossoff and kick David Perdue out of office.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2442/5b2c1286/3f9cde28/25f06a85/1436681158/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_22_perdue_vaca?refcode=em_2020_08_24_perdue_vaca")**

Hey friend,

Everything is happening a little differently this year, and that includes the way Granite Staters are casting our votes. A lot of folks in New Hampshire are skipping the polls and voting absentee.

The primary election is just two weeks away, and the general election isn’t far behind. That’s why I’m personally reaching out to all the grassroots members of Team Mowers today reminding you that **if you requested an absentee ballot, make sure to vote Mowers and turn them in to your local Clerk’s Office.**
|
---
[**VOTE ABSENTEE**](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=0ff5aa7c4f784b2d82932a8785779ce6&_e=tFZCoNDY8X1wJk7aWM8iwWNAXIbNW2mP97GlyDO83y1IlRGFtkFpw-0Ec12rAxANMg25qA2KYcjP8pFRoK0dEg9cImSLx8dpvbMvcclxPhTmYMbfeFkDYCwrHyv1IUfSlf-AoAE10FcO56K9nmU13NonwiT53fwDGbJtqHEP9Ubg1FnxgeeamqshKxxCPb0F8nUZEtlN7SWnlWeevHO8pHE8tQNZPm2Ptub6Ih6wg7D8BZXYPi7Mop5suKAdX93kv4CywTCU5G67AVyK-jvdHa8nTFyg6YrEGTnLs7jKsjMwkgfXGA7FZvwdDZnLX3NAyzANLe2S5P6Jh-YlYvLRRY6AVHUA8PMADKk0yWVi-MXR93EW9i79egyv8LA2x7y06LsJTGNyNKeiwYqGLmrtXfXG7tasAkV8Noq1680e5MhExFN3GGCsa3nDpS_Cc0LTiwKAmZ0Lfa8YJuG7dQq0v_dEeY_G_7DM6CSsZxuM3OpyFAIz7AY_JH5KRtZwb-pVBzO11G-YdTwNP718PYmKow%3D%3D)
|
---
If you don’t have an absentee ballot yet, it’s simple to request one:
1\. **[Visit this page to download the request form](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=0ff5aa7c4f784b2d82932a8785779ce6&_e=tFZCoNDY8X1wJk7aWM8iwWNAXIbNW2mP97GlyDO83y1IlRGFtkFpw-0Ec12rAxANMg25qA2KYcjP8pFRoK0dEg9cImSLx8dpvbMvcclxPhTmYMbfeFkDYCwrHyv1IUfSlf-AoAE10FcO56K9nmU13NonwiT53fwDGbJtqHEP9Ubg1FnxgeeamqshKxxCPb0F8nUZEtlN7SWnlWeevHO8pHE8tQNZPm2Ptub6Ih6wg7D8BZXYPi7Mop5suKAdX93kv4CywTCU5G67AVyK-jvdHa8nTFyg6YrEGTnLs7jKsjMwkgfXGA7FZvwdDZnLX3NAHYn_79B9Njt5hJYDUyr2hLHdNpuRhPxmpO0O51Cbue9pba7UMLGoNHyCZPWxOnzkNiVav9YTG0uI_KTbJGMtPM9eWFL8ia-09G8nMvAFMA_xDv_XTz0ffzho5_THZEUUu3A8ypcqO3db5td8Q-VPa1G9DcX4DcyarmZRttKEBG-j538vgENKEBz4xt7PYu9PogmqQ4gT1xJqoopBXreYoQ%3D%3D)**
2. Fill in your information (make sure to sign it!)
3\. Mail, fax, or hand deliver the completed form to your local City/Town clerk by election day
Then keep an eye out for the absentee ballot in your mailbox - it’s that easy.

If we don’t cast our votes, we’ll be stuck with income tax supporter Chris Pappas and Speaker Pelosi for another two years. That’s not something Granite Staters can afford.

**So don’t forget, vote Mowers!**

Thanks,

John
---
|
---
While Chris Pappas can count on Nancy Pelosi's deep pockets for funding, Matt Mowers is running a campaign funded by supporters like you. Will you chip in to help him fight back against the Left?

clean_body: Don’t miss your chance to vote in this year’s elections. Turn in your absentee ballots before it’s too late. | | | Hey friend, Everything is happening a little differently this year, and that includes the way Granite Staters are casting our votes. A lot of folks in New Hampshire are skipping the polls and voting absentee. The primary election is just two weeks away, and the general election isn’t far behind. That’s why I’m personally reaching out to all the grassroots members of Team Mowers today reminding you that if you requested an absentee ballot, make sure to vote Mowers and turn them in to your local Clerk’s Office. | | If you don’t have an absentee ballot yet, it’s simple to request one: 1\. 2. Fill in your information (make sure to sign it!) 3\. Mail, fax, or hand deliver the completed form to your local City/Town clerk by election day Then keep an eye out for the absentee ballot in your mailbox - it’s that easy. If we don’t cast our votes, we’ll be stuck with income tax supporter Chris Pappas and Speaker Pelosi for another two years. That’s not something Granite Staters can afford. So don’t forget, vote Mowers! Thanks, John | While Chris Pappas can count on Nancy Pelosi's deep pockets for funding, Matt Mowers is running a campaign funded by supporters like you. Will you chip in to help him fight back against the Left? | | | | | Paid for by Mowers for Congress | | P.O. Box 10297, Bedford, N.H. 03110 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Jacob Blake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
We need Congress to step up and legislate outside its comfort zone. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zdovuQh6AnzseedbOztB5U3N720NDadj7zRuigSklZR0ZUkUB6UokdBqpq_u8wcUDkCDLs1Os3TL1S7xoFn8QxQHLhncbHm6TFCF_crp9x2oMxxHN-ktORwIgLHZpViQbWWKhEip13Sty8VAsKDDkD_pWtY3pM6b8JwjG_QDA_TT3QTzLwTgpx1daXitYn2_MImki04Dmlru5NfibuWvkJkL9NbIOZ_6EQh4z_0pZ9JCDdfDVO3PCCPRQ1b6VS4a2UJYufpS7lQpLH4lYIUv2RyZhDa6PuWGy1U-Hx7G7Jm367c6CfEwyYuN4olgD2v2_21Tna9wGZUOqYOgY0l1sF_8CFiMrBxPuDBf99laBAFw/34l/c9KHmFzuSnidr-sPqOuHMg/h0/NiCYj2MFxcqWaoxmJ3GFu02K-uYnSy-izd7kVv34MQI) Friends, It’s been a summer of Black pain and anger on full display, and still today I woke up to a video of Jacob Blake, an unarmed Black man in Kenosha, Wisconsin, being shot seven times in the back, point-blank, by a White law enforcement officer. As disturbing as it is to see a video of another unarmed Black man shot by a cop circulating on social media, it is sadly unsurprising. Our society simply does not value Black lives. _That is a disgrace._ It’s not enough to paint Black Lives Matter murals in the streets. We need substantive policy reforms. We need accountability in law enforcement. We need to fire the cop who shot Jacob Blake, we need to prosecute that officer, and we need Congress to step up and legislate outside its comfort zone. Congress needs to reign in police forces that are no longer acting to keep the public safe, and instead are keeping them down. My prayers are with Jacob Blake now, and my vote will be with him and all of our Black brothers and sisters — like George Floyd and Breonna Taylor — when I am in office. I never again want to watch a cold-blooded murder or shooting of an unarmed Black person. Black Lives Matter, today and every day. Yours in the Struggle,
Mondaire [DONATE](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zdovuQh6AnzseedbOztB5U3N720NDadj7zRuigSklZR0ZUkUB6UokdBqpq_u8wcUDY1sIqzF_fVXpsb3CKkPQ657NzaQ8Lxy3kBakpXLk6plQJ2Or506ZXXGisf6qCURzfzg3wfdmz10ZJeR-5C23vSReqk4-x9-Q-fF9s4ZlE_u7KUicR2SlQEpwJX32zVtKm4E_mXz1C5ZeLS8PWCX52ev2w-OGwGEyRrhGzt22A9v3_ttT5YNL96WEa5g4volAsVQKj_aG3NWHxmtIxVTCBWaBk4dym7u5XwhqvkrP9jfEbeUXleX4bO7lOgFKFp8x9NXnqFIS0cR4-_GaXGhzjZtvoMU9n-l7lFDsLdfr3_Q/34l/c9KHmFzuSnidr-sPqOuHMg/h1/phn7TDLPpZjn6D2VLO-3i0-dmCz_SjCDzS48tiFIjtI)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Will=20Douglas=20for=20State=20House?=
subject: Will Douglas Endorsed by the Elite News
body:
Oldest African-American owned and operated newspaper in North Texas endorses Republican nominee for Texas House District 113. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/willdouglasfortexas/darryl-blair-elite-news-endorsement-8-24-2020?e=4f010155df)
---
| | [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=1908c6fb08&e=4f010155df)
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
August 24, 2020
---
**CONTACT:[Trevor Naglieri](mailto:trevor@highpostgroup.com?subject=Will%20Douglas%20\(TX-HD-113\))**
(508) 826-5135
---
| **Elite News Switches Support from Rhetta Bowers (D) to Will Douglas (R) in Texas House District 113**
_**Endorses First Republican Politician in 20 Years**_
**Dallas, TX** – Will Douglas, Republican nominee for Texas House District 113, was endorsed this week by the _Elite News_ , the oldest African-American owned and operated newspaper in North Texas. The _Elite News_ previously supported incumbent State Representative Rhetta Bowers (D).

**Darryl E. Blair Sr., Publisher of the _Elite News_ , said the following:**
_“Our state is at a crossroads, and we need leaders with the courage, honesty, and integrity to lead us back and deliver real results for their constituents. Based on that premise, I will do something that I have not done in 20 years: I will endorse a Republican for public office.

"The stakes are too high to stand on the sidelines — I stand with Will Douglas (R) for State Representative. As a pharmacist and small businessman, Will knows what it takes to build businesses and create jobs that benefit working-class citizens.

"I can confidently say that he’s a true leader who will always do what’s right for our communities, and I’m proud to endorse him to be the next State Representative for House District 113 over the incumbent Rep. Rhetta Bowers (D)."_

**Will Douglas said the following:**
_"I'm honored to be the first Republican in 20 years endorsed by Darryl Blair of the Elite News. He has long been a champion of the Black community in Dallas, and I look forward to working closely with him to achieve real results for our region and improving the lives of the hard-working families of Texas House District 113."_
_###_
Will Douglas is a self-made pharmacy owner and graduate of the University of Oklahoma College of Pharmacy. Through hard work and long hours, Will purchased several small pharmacies and currently manages his own business, Crimson Care Pharmacy Group. Named one of Dallas County’s “40 under 40,” Will is running for office to ensure the next generation of Texans can live in a state where the economy is strong and our communities are safe.
---

name: Steve Bullock
subject: Uphill climb
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
When I decided to run for Senate, I knew it would be an uphill climb -- just like Senator Hassan's 2016 race in New Hampshire. That's why she said I should reach out.
**The corporate special interests who have captured Washington for too long will spend any amount of money to keep their grip on power. And since I got into this race, that's exactly what they've done -- to the tune of over $26 million on attack ads here in Montana.**
In my time as Montana's Governor, we've been able to look past the partisan food fights to bring people from across the state together around issues that matter to all of us.
We've worked with Republicans and Democrats alike to expand affordable health care, protect our public lands and outdoor spaces, and pass one of the strongest campaign finance laws in the country.
That kind of common sense is exactly what scares the big corporate interests into opening their wallets. They're spending big to stop us from bringing Montana values to Washington.
**We have just one week until our August fundraising deadline and our campaign isn't taking any money from corporate PACs. Instead, we're counting on contributions from people like you to reach our goal.[Will you make a donation today to help? $3 or more would be a huge help.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc5db/2a380d31/232cc715/f0a251/4088690514/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0YnVsbG9jayIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjAwODI0X01XSDRCdWxsb2NrXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4bullock?refcode=e20200824_MWH4Bullock_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Steve Bullock and Maggie Hassan._
**[Click to donate $3.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc5db/2a380d31/232cc715/f0a252/4088690514/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0YnVsbG9jayIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjAwODI0X01XSDRCdWxsb2NrXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UVNCOWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4bullock?refcode=e20200824_MWH4Bullock_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=3")**

**[Click to donate $50.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc5db/2a380d31/232cc715/f0a25c/4088690514/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0YnVsbG9jayIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjAwODI0X01XSDRCdWxsb2NrXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UXlCOWZRPT0iOiI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4bullock?refcode=e20200824_MWH4Bullock_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc5db/2a380d31/232cc715/f0a251/4088690514/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0YnVsbG9jayIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjAwODI0X01XSDRCdWxsb2NrXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4bullock?refcode=e20200824_MWH4Bullock_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
Washington is a place where talking about something has become a substitute for doing something. That's no accident. Big corporate interests spend millions to keep it that way.

I'm running for Senate to change that and make real progress on the issues that matter to all of us -- just like we've done here in Montana.

Thank you for making this campaign possible. I know that together, we can make a real difference in people's lives both here in Montana and across the country.
-- Steve

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Wesley Hunt Releases Digital Ad: "Firsts"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
# **Wesley Hunt Releases Digital Ad: "Firsts"**
Houston, TX - Today, Wesley Hunt, Houston native and combat veteran running in Texas' 7th Congressional District, released a new digital advertisement, _[Firsts](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=45bc50be65e140619a36456c7fc37866&_e=VJ6Jfszfcg38xL14ecbFdII2ju96Mnr9hovsP4dcXAWQDl7wITPVuGET5UXUclQx5AkcYJOUGhNUCvgHPuIxuWiZ7hm497vXNqlQf4hAn5E1Fa9U80d72nvjZsw66xu6BGkQKN5xgBh35M_bsbZE_6ZDBab353NSSmEDw_JgUkpLsG1v1K7mfljxN_RCrX09yauT1REBgKddkAsmHMuM7imgtCU-olSQANjonblCBXbWvZ37k7Z2ZwRj5JxonaFWQFHp9YoeuX6OlTblVp-kUQVUA7rAXfXtjRVtQRM8Pbs%3D)_ _._ _Firsts_ speaks to the spirit of advancement that has catapulted the United States to unprecedented achievements and captures Wesley's belief that the same pursuit of progress will carry us into an even brighter future.

_"For centuries, Americans have challenged the notion of what is possible and each new breakthrough has carried with it a wave of __opportunity and optimism_ _ for future generations,_" said **Hunt**. _"America's legacy of leadership and advancement is ingrained in the ethos of our service academies, where past, present, and future leaders begin their journey of giving back to this great Nation. As I campaign to be the next member of Congress for Texas' 7th District, I hope to live up to the example set by fellow West Point graduates Henry O. Flipper and Roscoe Robinson Jr."_

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=45bc50be65e140619a36456c7fc37866&_e=VJ6Jfszfcg38xL14ecbFdII2ju96Mnr9hovsP4dcXAWQDl7wITPVuGET5UXUclQx5AkcYJOUGhNUCvgHPuIxuc7TfZL7c3VTfaf_MvSRrVqG5UrvJfItazdLZ9vcampICT5cuIXT7kIUOu_Hf6VEW8g65t8I28l5iG8Y5J3fSDUfqTGdp9yWVsTlXeeW5IqlTobBUC_kcU2sIIJMsjm_j0ZQjBnty0FJxDmXuq3JSHcTIS6dB9zdAoiXL4DG7cI25hNQvjid6SLztbmAjOx9QDrRW6lzZ4sy9IpuezhCD24%3D)
[Click here to watch _Firsts_.](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=45bc50be65e140619a36456c7fc37866&_e=VJ6Jfszfcg38xL14ecbFdII2ju96Mnr9hovsP4dcXAWQDl7wITPVuGET5UXUclQx5AkcYJOUGhNUCvgHPuIxuSpYEARhpPG5POpnURv3AH_lqI1h6H2D8slJrpG-Flr_5gRmYzLsUjrFiwt8u2vB7_bi5DWTY3aX48j_tmYXPzXjNfA-UB9DXHlpOFZaFxnIDD-SRxeExtiA7VqQq9lJ_Jr1BPevD8Oqm0DCOTeC84eindtSQvfcxGvTAKU6ihFqg5J9uyXNj83PyJtsh_srNd0RUOxPMncvAUf9GI8oe08%3D)

**FIRSTS :60 DIGITAL**
_**Wesley Hunt** : America is a nation of firsts.

We have come a long way and yet our struggle for progress never ceases.

This enduring spirit for advancement continues at the premiere leadership institutions of the world: the service academies.

It began with Henry O. Flipper. Born a slave, he became the first black American to graduate from West Point.

In 1951, Roscoe Robinson Jr. graduated West Point. Later, he would become the first black American to rise to the ranks of four-star general.

And, in 2020 the West Point graduating class included 38 black American women, the highest number in its history.

As your Congressman, I'll be the first black service academy graduate from our five storied institutions to join the ranks of Congress.

It's a solemn responsibility that I carry with me every day.

And I know that as the first it makes certain I won't be the last.

I'm Wesley Hunt and I approve this message._

Hunt is a Houston native and a battle-tested leader willing to stand up for the 7th Congressional District. While his opponent Lizzie Fletcher made Pelosi Speaker of the House and refuses to condemn the most liberal of Democratic priorities, Wesley is a problem solver who will work with both sides to bring results home to the 7th District.
###

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=45bc50be65e140619a36456c7fc37866&_e=VJ6Jfszfcg38xL14ecbFdJ640g52eOCWZfCx5LEKPBwGonf9cn1qT4Bhf-0t4grg0mAhhIezh0RnXpX5u0UIUdj9xIrf9Pc1EtN3i1gZ9RTXPJAuqw8nGNZYtIQB4ts6O9zBnKJNo4T0BPAiCf0AGhmaOlAhU-YNEhtQdARG-AIXWFCrvyCMcLwc0_hpSKQ0bfICoCVd_UctMhgi7SzwmIo6jwyHjyUSEvb9JCwA5binqBN0pMGxTVf5PJpKUzcnMf0Xu7AX79QMMtIOI2YH8NaEFhdeTHmh2ftCQYcwXS0%3D)****
---

name: Mark Warner
subject: We need a new Postmaster General
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
The U.S. Postal Service is under attack from the Trump administration.
|
---

| | Hi, Derek --

The U.S. Postal Service is under attack by the Trump administration.

Postmaster General Louis DeJoy has done everything in his power to undermine a service that millions of Americans rely on: removing mailboxes, cutting staff overtime hours, and getting rid of mail sorting machines.

For the last few weeks I've been hearing from constituents who were bearing the brunt of these changes to USPS. I heard from folks who were told they were late on bills they never received, and folks who were waiting on important medications. I also heard from folks who wanted me to do more to protect this critical service.

**So, here 's what I'm doing: I'm calling on Postmaster General Louis DeJoy to resign.**

From what I've heard from Virginians and what is being reported across the nation, it's clear that he's not the right person for the job. We need someone in that post who will do right by the American people and who understands that the role of the postal service is to serve -- _service is even in the name._

**[If you're with me, please sign onto my petition calling for DeJoy's resignation.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db2e/53d9897e/5424121d/1c8835be/4002863285/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-dejoyresign")**

Millions of people across the country rely on the postal service for their medicine, to pay their bills, and come November, to cast their ballots. I'll do everything in my power to make sure you can keep relying on this critical service.

-- Mark Warner
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db2e/53d9897e/5424121d/1c8835bd/4002863285/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyNSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200824_p_1_fl__725__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db2e/53d9897e/5424121d/1c8835bc/4002863285/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Khizr Khan

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
At the 2016 Democratic National Convention in Philadelphia, I offered to lend Donald Trump my copy of our Constitution. |
---

Peter,

At the 2016 Democratic National Convention in Philadelphia, I offered to lend Donald Trump my copy of our Constitution: | [](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B3_Khan_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B3_Khan_X__F1_S2_C1__full")
---
Fast forward four years, and it is clear that Donald Trump lacks any respect for the words inscribed in our Constitution, nor our Democratic institutions.

He believes he is above the law. **He is not.** He believes that there are no consequences for his blatant assault on our democracy. [With your help, we will prove him wrong.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B3_Khan_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B3_Khan_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

On Thursday night, Donald Trump will wrongfully use White House grounds to address the nation during the Republican National Convention. This is an important moment to fight back against Trump's lawlessness, and replace him with an honorable and decent man in Joe Biden.

So with just three days until Trump's address, and just 71 days until Election Day, this is the most urgent ask of you I have made to-date. [ Will you join me and stand up for our country by chipping in $25 to elect Joe Biden and save our democracy? His team needs to raise another 425,000 donations before Trump takes the podium on Thursday night.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B3_Khan_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B3_Khan_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

I was proud to endorse Joe Biden early in this election, because I know Joe, and more importantly, Joe knows us.

Joe understands the pain that comes with losing a child. And he has turned that grief into purpose, to serve others. I share Joe's mission, and I believe there is no greater purpose we can have this year than to elect Joe as our next president and fight for our democracy.

[Peter, I hope you agree. I hope you'll join me to dig deep today and pitch in $25 to Joe's campaign, because our nation's future is riding on how we choose to act in this moment:](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B3_Khan_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B3_Khan_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. Joe understands the pain that comes with losing a child. And he has turned that grief into purpose, to serve others. I share Joe's mission, and I believe there is no greater purpose we can have this year than to elect Joe as our next president and fight for our democracy. "" "" Gratefully, Khizr Khan | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

subject: Before Trump's convention starts tonight, show your support for these 3 Virginia women
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good VA
body:
| | |
Derek,
2018 was a historic year for Virginia Democrats. Three incredible women shocked the world by flipping Republican seats in the midterm. Now Jennifer Wexton, Abigail Spanberger, and Elaine Luria are making us proud by fighting for Virginians in a Democratically controlled House of Representatives. But here’s the thing. If these women lose in 2020, I guarantee you Democrats will be fighting for their lives to keep control of the House. If we want to keep the progressive momentum going for Virginia and our country, we have to fight like hell to make sure these women win! **[Can you pitch in anything you can afford right now? Your contribution will ensure each of these women have the resources they need to run winning campaigns.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xeK4qnNs_YP89eiyCIyZqnaxI0Da2MrFvIituSTi-QYycEKPa6OaV4eBkgs_FUk1HMaWMeqRo5evNM6NKxOP0iIV09nCBO7J9avCkSA4uCF6n8-2RwS2YRVysO0Z0BSDHKX_dnKlR28uPAJnYqc_t039Yt_WPPlV3ELbU-WjakNLVI00uLUQn57vv3sh6tF4i0Mi02gN1RQw4OW4gT-w188Sxph8_zJXvq5WzW_kbt_CDN2gQZ9wiS-Q5lSnjOlx3LP75uZpvyTgS50Tr1HhJla5rXbrRCdJpUEoIwc5BDOdouVJ8Gu50Le46DuPN2IN5fqQohwWT6Ft67TWvq8DGJHgWfjYMWvvwXChY-BZXi2goSuHBs3xI4nN5_jlKtARFwTgicbkwKyHGhof72HIwd1351cTWVZMwP5b8apsz3k8yGPiwUQauxZhrcromsAUMXiP5CjQb4ZDgNRRpPbbdm/34l/vxhO1eB-RKSzWSRBvloRVw/h0/71DfMq_HoUlNb1nbsMCG80_Vi268ROlep3etxDx1n3c)** It’s not theoretical. We see what gets done for Virginians when Democrats are in the majority. Just compare the Senate and House responses to COVID-19. Mitch McConnell did nothing and unemployment insurance expired for millions of Americans. Meanwhile, House Democrats passed a relief bill months ago. Imagine what would happen if Democrats somehow lost the House. How could we get anything done to help Virginia families? I’m not about to let that happen and I know you aren’t either. **[Please join me in supporting three great Virginia Democrats. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: First Lady unveils new exhibit!
body:
First Lady Melania Trump unveiled her new “Building the Movement” exhibit this morning on the White House’s North Lawn. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5752fec86c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • August 24, 2020
---
| | |
# **First Lady unveils new exhibit!**

**First Lady Melania Trump** unveiled her new “Building the Movement” exhibit this morning on the White House’s North Lawn. The project honors the 100th anniversary of women’s suffrage in the United States with artwork from students across the country.

🎬 [**WATCH: First Lady unveils exhibit outside White House**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7eababda7d&e=3ee4985eea)

**The exhibit** also features historic photographs woven throughout, bringing the history of the women’s suffrage movement to life through the eyes of children today.

**“The ratification of the 19th Amendment** and the women’s right to vote was a turning point in the history of women’s rights in the United States and stood as an example to the world,” she said.

**“Since taking office,** my husband and this Administration have taken historic measures to empower and support women in the United States and around the world.”

[**Watch the First Lady’s full remarks here.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eab6109532&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE:**[**First Lady announces reopening of White House Rose Garden**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1555cfaeda&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **NEW: How President Trump is helping lift 1 million Americans out of poverty**

**One million Americans** will be lifted from poverty because of President Trump’s historic Opportunity Zones tax cuts program, the White House Council of Economic Advisers estimates in a new report today.

**For over 50 years** , the “War on Poverty” has left too many American communities behind. Many of its programs have “relied on inefficient top-down federal grants and subsidies that empower Washington bureaucrats and special interests with lobbyists at the expense of communities in need,” HUD Secretary Ben Carson and White House Domestic Policy Council Director Brooke Rollins wrote today.

🎬 [**WATCH: In just 2 years, $75 billion is pouring into low-income areas**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fbcebe0877&e=3ee4985eea)

**In contrast,** America’s nearly 8,800 Opportunity Zones—designated after President Trump’s 2017 Tax Cuts and Jobs Act—qualify for incentives to encourage private-sector investment, job creation, and self-sufficiency instead of government dependency.

**“We’re providing massive tax incentives** for private investment in these areas to create jobs and opportunities where they are needed the most,” President Trump said at a meeting of the White House Opportunity and Revitalization Council last year.

**“This is all** throughout the country.”

**About 35 million Americans** live in these historically distressed areas, where the average poverty rate is double that of other communities. These underserved areas are also home to a higher share of African Americans and Hispanic Americans.

**Over $75 billion** has been raised through 2019 for qualified opportunity funds to serve these communities. These investments are expected to create a minimum of 500,000 new jobs, as well as an 11 percent decrease in poverty.

**“It's having a profound effect**. As far as property values are concerned, they go up 1.1 percent just with the announcement of you being in an Opportunity Zone,” Secretary Carson said in an interview with Fox News.

[**Ben Carson and Brooke Rollins: “Opportunity zones key to lifting people out of poverty”**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0ddb2b7008&e=3ee4985eea)

**Read the report:**[**The Impact of Opportunity Zones**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9806b6eaa7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump waves goodnight as he walks along the Colonnade** | August 23, 2020

---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=24dd6201b0&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4ae61d2c9f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=e764d64c8f)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Kyle=20Hupfer?=
subject: It's Official: Trump-Pence 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Earlier today in Charlotte, 336 delegates from every U.S. state and territory came together and made it official -- President Donald Trump and Vice

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/its-official-trump-pence-2020?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-4-072720?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Why_Indiana_s_5th_matters_in_2020&amount=&mc_cid=14a29db6e5&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
https://www.facebook.com/ChairmanHupfer/posts/166872704928123?mc_cid=14a29db6e5&mc_eid=[UNIQID]

Hoosier Republican,

Earlier today in Charlotte, 336 delegates from every U.S. state and territory came together and made it official -- President Donald Trump and Vice President Mike Pence will be our 2020 Republican nominees for President and Vice President of the United States!

I was honored to be there to officially award Indiana's 58 delegates (watch the video here) (https://www.facebook.com/ChairmanHupfer/posts/166872704928123?mc_cid=14a29db6e5&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , and show our Hoosier pride off to the nation -- including yesterday's 104th running of the Indy 500, our basketball legends, our status as the home of Mike Pence, and the fact that Indiana was first on the board on Election Night 2016 for our Trump-Pence team.

I can't wait for November 3, when together we're the FIRST state to deliver victory for President Trump and Vice President Pence!
WATCH NOW Indiana's Delegates Awarded to President Trump >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/protect-the-2nd-amendment?mc_cid=14a29db6e5&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

This week, they've got some excellent programming in the works for you at the Republican National Convention, so make sure that you tune in. (https://www.2020gopconvention.com/?mc_cid=14a29db6e5&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

And on Wednesday and Thursday nights, your state and local Republican Parties have organized in-person watch parties. Social distancing will be observed, and masks will be required. Check it out:

subject: Massachusetts Week of Action: Ed Markey & Ihssane Leckey
body:
Our Week of Action is Massachusetts is just kicking off! We need your help! | | | | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=7e82648452&e=66979298f9)
---
| | |
# **MASSACHUSETTS WEEK OF ACTION KICK-OFF!**
---
|
---
|
# MASSACHUSETTS SLATE
---
| _We are kicking off our Massachusetts Week of Action for Senator Ed Markey and Ihssane Leckey!_
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=59da608ae5&e=66979298f9)
---
#### **Senator Ed Markey **is up for re-election and as the co-author of the Green New Deal, he's being challenged.
It's not a secret, Senator Ed Markey placed a huge target on his back the second he co-authored the Green New Deal with Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez. While the nation celebrated such a bold climate and economic proposal, others, like Joe Kennedy III, felt that challenging Senator Markey was the only way to protect his $1.75 million dollars worth of oil stocks with Chevron, ExxonMobil, and Schlumberger.

Needless to say, dark money is pouring into this race fast, and we must fight back. Sign up to make calls to re-elect Ed and give the GND a fair shot!
| [Take the GND Pledge!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=80670448d0&e=66979298f9 "Take the GND Pledge!")
---
| [Volunteer to Phone/Text Bank for Ed!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=bac6e01449&e=66979298f9 "Volunteer to Phone/Text Bank for Ed!")
---
| [Start Making Calls Now!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=060f64e138&e=66979298f9 "Start Making Calls Now!")
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=1671ce7942&e=66979298f9)
---
#### **Ihssane Leckey **is running for Massachusett's 4th Congressional District!
The 2020 election may be one of the most defining of our lifetime and Ihssane Leckey embodies the courage needed to change the course of our future. As an immigrant from Morocco, turned Wall Street regulator, Ihssane saw first hand how a system that is stacked against the People in favor of the wealthy and powerful, can tear directly into the fabric of the American Dream.

Ihssane knows that the power to build the country we believe in, lies within us. Future Generations is proud to endorse Ihssane for Massachusetts 4th Congressional district to fight for a nation that prioritizes environmental, racial, educational, and healthcare justice - above all else.
| [Take Ihssane's "Your Power" Pledge!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=0993f94f79&e=66979298f9 "Take Ihssane's "Your Power" Pledge!")
---
| [Volunteer to Phone/Text Bank for Ihssane!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9a483e8df6&e=66979298f9 "Volunteer to Phone/Text Bank for Ihssane!")
---
| [Start Making Calls Now!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=850097b959&e=66979298f9 "Start Making Calls Now!")
---
|
---
| | Due to COVID-19 health and safety restrictions, campaigns are focusing on phone and text banking to get our candidates message to their constituents.** **
---
| [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9411f6c35a&e=66979298f9)
---
| The coronavirus pandemic has really changed the way we do politics. Our organization stretches every penny that is donated to keep our operations going and provide the best support to our amazing candidates. From text banking, door hangers, and safety equipment for our team, we count entirely on grassroots donations because we are powered by the People.

_We are youth-founded, organized, and led. We volunteer all of our time to fight for future generations. We thank you for your support._

**With just one week before the September 1st Massachusetts Primary, can you commit to $15 a month until we win in November?**
---
| [Split $15 with Ed and Future Generations](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=1f56e7d93d&e=66979298f9 "Split $15 with Ed and Future Generations")
---
| [Split $15 with Ihssane and Future Generations](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=5e24dbaab3&e=66979298f9 "Split $15 with Ihssane and Future Generations")
---
|
---
|
### A NOTE FROM CHIARA D'ANGELO
---
| |
---
To ensure that we can get this candidates across the finish line we need a grassroots army of volunteers. Every volunteer hour counts. We have a once in a lifetime opportunity to elect two bold progressives who stand with courage to fight for justice and dignified life for all. As the primary season is coming to an end, I'd like to personally thank you all for the countless hours, donations, and support - we couldn't do it without you.

Chiara D'Angelo
National Campaigns Director
[Chiara](mailto:Chiara@futuregenerations.earth)[@FutureGenerations.Earth](mailto:Roza@FutureGenerations.Earth)

name: MJ Hegar HQ
subject: Sen. Cornyn and Mitch McConnell are taking a break.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
While Texans need relief, the Senate is in recess.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fe8/7f51f7bc/43f7b803/4ef7c49c/325121269/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fe8/7f51f7bc/43f7b803/4ef7c493/325121269/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200824.3nd__1969__&amount=10")
---
Can you believe it, Peter? Mitch McConnell and his right-hand man, Sen. John Cornyn, have sent the Senate into recess. **They 're _taking a break_** while working families all over Texas deal with:
* COVID-19 cases ravaging our communities
* The highest uninsured rate in the entire country
* Sky-high unemployment
* The loss of expanded unemployment insurance
* Schools rushing to reopen even as nearly 100,000 children tested positive for COVID-19 at the end of July

... and more. But frankly, even if the Senate were in session, chances are low that Sen. Cornyn and his DC bosses would do the right thing. Before he let them expire, Sen. Cornyn called expanded unemployment insurance for people who lost their jobs due to the pandemic "a mistake."

**Texans need a senator who will get to work for our families, not bail out special interests and then take a break in the middle of a crisis. Pitch in to help MJ defeat Sen. Cornyn and fight for _all_ Texans in the Senate:**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fe8/7f51f7bc/43f7b803/4ef7c492/325121269/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200824.3nd__1969__&amount=5")**

**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fe8/7f51f7bc/43f7b803/4ef7c490/325121269/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200824.3nd__1969__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fe8/7f51f7bc/43f7b803/4ef7c497/325121269/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200824.3nd__1969__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fe8/7f51f7bc/43f7b803/4ef7c496/325121269/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200824.3nd__1969__")**
Thanks,
MJ Hegar HQ

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fe8/7f51f7bc/43f7b803/4ef7c493/325121269/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200824.3nd__1969__&amount=10")

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fe8/7f51f7bc/43f7b803/4ef7c495/325121269/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1969&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fe8/7f51f7bc/43f7b803/4ef7c494/325121269/VEsHBQ/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: Jon Ossoff (personal)
subject: Re: A racist conspiracy theorist is soon to be Georgia's newest Congresswoman
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
We can't stand for this. |
---
Friend,

Donald Trump continues to encourage the dangerous, extremist "QAnon" conspiracy movement.

Trump applauded the Georgia Primary win of Republican Congressional candidate Marjorie Taylor Greene, the racist conspiracy theorist who is now a shoo-in for a seat in Congress. _The President called her a future star of the GOP!_

**My opponent David Perdue, who was caught enlarging my nose in an attack ad, refuses to denounce Marjorie Taylor Greene even as she becomes the face of Republican politics here in Georgia.**

_I've spoken with many Republican voters who are horrified by Senator Perdue's conduct and cowardice._

Friend, my opponent has indulged in an anti-Semitic campaign tactic, and he refuses to confront dangerous right-wing extremism within his own party. David Perdue is too cowardly to take responsibility for his own actions or to take a stand for decency within the GOP.

**The overwhelming majority of Georgians, Democrats, and Republicans, want peaceful co-existence, tolerance, and unity. In the Senate, I will represent that goodness, decency, and compassion -- not pander to extremists, no matter their ideology.**
